sentence: 她喜欢打扮，愿意有朋友，可是这都不过是一些小小的、哀而不伤的、青春的游戏
translation_en: She likes to dress up, is willing to have friends, but all of this is just some small, sad yet harmless, youthful games.
translation_zh: 她喜欢打扮自己，乐意交友，但所有这些都是些哀而不伤的年少玩笑。

sentence: 看她俩挨肩搭背的样子，就知道是一对好朋友
translation_en: Just by looking at how they're leaning on each other, you can tell that they're good friends.
translation_zh: 只看他们俩靠在一起的姿势就能知道他们是好朋友。

sentence: 那个人极端自私，爱财如命
translation_en: That person is extremely selfish, money means everything to him.
translation_zh: 他对钱的贪婪程度，爱财如命。

sentence: 他长期以来安常守故，缺乏锻炼，因而经不起挫折
translation_en: He has always been conservative and stuck to his old ways, lacking exercise as a result, and therefore unable to withstand setbacks.
translation_zh: 他一直很保守，死抱着旧习惯不放，缺乏锻炼，结果难以应对挫折。

sentence: 各国都应采取一些安富恤贫的措施，以保障社会的安定
translation_en: Every country should take some measures to alleviate poverty, ensuring social stability.
translation_zh: 各国应采取措施缓解贫困问题，确保社会稳定安富恤贫。

sentence: 在敌人的强大攻势下，我军阵地安如泰山
translation_en: Our positions stood firm under the enemy's fierce onslaught.
translation_zh: 我们的阵地像泰山一样坚不可摧，抵御了敌人的强烈进攻。

sentence: 能够找到职业，找到安身之处，该是多么令人高兴啊
translation_en: It's truly wonderful to have found a job, to have found a place where one can settle down.
translation_zh: 找到安身之处真的是件非常美好的事情。

sentence: 他长期以来安时处顺，缺乏锻炼，因而经不起挫折
translation_en: He has always been laid-back, lacking in physical exercise, and therefore unable to withstand setbacks.
translation_zh: 他总是安时处顺，缺乏体力锻炼，因此无法承受挫折。

sentence: 太阳过了，整个天空又显得暗淡无光，北风在头项上呼呼地嚎叫着
translation_en: The sun has passed, leaving the entire sky looking dull and dim, with the north wind howling loudly at my neck.
translation_zh: 太阳已经过去了，整个天空显得暗淡无光，北风呼啸着在我脖子旁边怒吼。

sentence: 上自王后，下至弄臣，骇得凝结着的神色也应声活动起来，似乎感到暗无天日的悲哀
translation_en: From queen to clown, even those with frozen expressions seem to come alive, as if they too feel an overwhelming sense of despair in the dark.
translation_zh: 从皇后到丑角，连脸上僵硬的表情也似乎活了过来，仿佛他们也在黑暗中感受到一种压倒性的绝望感，如同暗无天日。

sentence: 先生有志于木刻，是极好的事，但访木刻家是无益的，因为就是已有成绩的木刻家，也还在暗中摸索
translation_en: The gentleman has an ambition to carve wood, which is a very good thing, but visiting woodcarvers is of no use because even those who have achieved success in woodcarving are still groping in secret.
translation_zh: 这位绅士有一个雄心勃勃的愿望，想雕刻木头，这是件很好的事情，但去拜访木匠却毫无用处，因为即使那些在木雕方面取得成功的人，也仍然是在暗中摸索。

sentence: 阳光孤零零地落在街心上，也觉黯然无色
translation_en: The sunlight fell desolately on the street, also feeling dull and colorless.
translation_zh: 阳光黯然无色地洒落在街上，显得又灰暗又乏味。

sentence: 某些人做事不从实际出发，往往昂首天外
translation_en: Some people do things without considering reality, often looking up to the sky with their heads held high.
translation_zh: 有些人做事不考虑现实，总是昂首天外。

sentence: 天空中那只老鹰遨翔自得，真让人羡慕
translation_en: The eagle soaring freely in the sky is truly something to envy.
translation_zh: 遨翔自得的老鹰在天空中自由翱翔，令人羡慕不已。

sentence: 我国目前蚕茧总产量已超过了日本，国际蚕丝市场上，我们已鳌头独占了
translation_en: Our country's total silk cocoon production has already surpassed that of Japan, and we now dominate the international silk market.
translation_zh: 鳌头独占世界丝绸市场已成现实，我们的国家总产量已经超过日本，目前占据国际上絕对的优势。

sentence: 傲不可长，像他那样傲慢的孩子，家长应加强教育
translation_en: Children who are too proud to learn, like him, need their parents to strengthen their education.
translation_zh: 傲不可長的人，像他一樣，需要父母加強他的教育。

sentence: 这也是个好办法，而且简单易行，不过还不是拔本塞源之计
translation_en: This is also a good approach, and it's simple to implement, but it doesn't get at the root of the problem.
translation_zh: 这也是一个好的方法，实施起来也很简单，但它并没有解决问题的根本。

sentence: 那种不顾学生能否接受的填鸭式的教学方法，无异于拔苗助长
translation_en: Teaching methods that disregard whether students can accept them, amount to forcing growth prematurely.
translation_zh: 教法若不顾学生是否能接受，等于拔苗助长。

sentence: 如今这里已拔帜易帜，另换新主了
translation_en: The flag has been lowered, and a new master has taken over here now.
translation_zh: 旗杆一落，新主子就接管了这里。

sentence: 这幅抽象画，对一般人来说都是白雪难和
translation_en: This abstract painting is like white snow to ordinary people.
translation_zh: 这幅抽象画对普通人来说就像白雪难和。

sentence: 老妇人于是百般抚慰，把自己年轻时抚慰孩子的语句，一一背了出来
translation_en: The elderly woman then comforted her with every means at her disposal, reciting word for word the comforting phrases she used to tell children when they were young.
translation_zh: 老太太百般抚慰她，尽全力用各种方式安慰她，并且一字不差地背诵过去告诉小孩子的那些温暖的话语。

sentence: 美术展览会上展出了许多新作品，百花齐放，各具风格
translation_en: The art exhibition showcased many new works, with diverse styles on full display.
translation_zh: 百花齐放的艺术展览展示了众多新作，各式风格尽显。

sentence: 对报名参军的人挑选很严格，可以说是百里挑一
translation_en: The selection process for those who sign up to join the military is very strict, almost one out of every hundred.
translation_zh: 军事入伍的报名者经过严格筛选，百里挑一。

sentence: 这种怪事百年难遇，今天倒开了眼界
translation_en: This kind of strange thing is hard to encounter even after a hundred years, but today it has opened my eyes.
translation_zh: 这类奇怪的事情，即使经过百年难遇，也依然在今天打开了我的眼睛。

sentence: 古人都知道百年树人的道理，我们更应该把培养人才这件大事抓好
translation_en: Our ancestors have always understood the importance of cultivating people over time, so we should make sure to do this important task well.
translation_zh: 我们的祖先一直深知培养人才的重要性，百年树人，所以我们一定要认真地做好这一项工作。

sentence: 这真是令人百思莫解
translation_en: This is truly beyond comprehension.
translation_zh: 百思莫解的道理，令人难以理解。

sentence: 在百无聊赖中，随手抓过一本书来，科学也好，文学也好，横竖什么都一样
translation_en: In a state of utter boredom, I picked up a book at random, whether it's science or literature makes no difference.
translation_zh: 在百无聊赖的状态下，我随意拿起一本书，科学还是文学都无所谓。

sentence: 由于金融危机的缘故，造成了经济动荡，百业萧条
translation_en: The financial crisis has led to economic turmoil, with all industries suffering greatly.
translation_zh: 金融危机导致经济混乱，百业萧条。

sentence: 对孩子百依百从是不行的
translation_en: It's impossible to blindly follow every instruction from children.
translation_zh: 不能盲目遵循孩子们的每一条指示。

sentence: 从古到今，人们总是唾弃那些败德辱行的人
translation_en: From ancient times to the present, people have always despised those with bad morals and shameful conduct.
translation_zh: 从古至今，人们一直鄙视那些败德辱行的人。

sentence: 自古以来，因为奸臣陷害忠良，以致败国亡家，这种例子也不少
translation_en: Throughout history, it has been due to treacherous officials framing loyal subjects that countries have fallen and families have perished; there are many such examples.
translation_zh: 历史上，都是奸臣陷害忠良而导致国家灭亡、家族覆灭的例子很多。

sentence: 大英雄说话板上砸钉，你既然还愿意给弟兄们办事，那就看你说的吧
translation_en: If you're still willing to do something for your brothers, then let's see what you have to say.
translation_zh: 如果你还愿意为兄弟们做点什么，那就让我们看看你有何话可说，别在板上砸钉。

sentence: 差多了，差多了！人到三十五，就半截入土了
translation_en: It's already late, it's already late! By the time you're thirty-five, half of your life is over.
translation_zh: 已经晚了，已经晚了！你三十五岁之前，半截入土的日子就占去了半生。

sentence: 他不理会内行的嗤笑，写啊改啊，改啊写啊，终于写出了好作品，成了一个颇有希望的半路出家的作家
translation_en: He ignored the sneers of insiders, writing and rewriting, until he finally produced a good work and became a promising writer who turned to literature mid-career.
translation_zh: 他无视内行的嘲笑，反复写作，直到最终创作出了好作品，并在事业中途转向文学成为了一位有前途的作家。

sentence: 想跑，水裹住他的脚，他就那么半死不活的，低着头一步一步的往前曳
translation_en: He wanted to run, but water wrapped around his legs, so he just dragged himself forward step by step with his head hung low, half dead.
translation_zh: 他想要跑，但水包围着他的腿，于是他只好一步步地拖着自己前进，头低着，半死不活。

sentence: 爷爷虽然年纪很大了，但宝刀未老，依然每天出去晨练
translation_en: Grandpa may be very old, but his sword remains sharp; he still goes out for morning exercise every day.
translation_zh: grandfather 的宝刀未老，仍每天早上出去锻炼。

sentence: 人们那被晒黑的饱经风霜的脸上，显出严肃而紧张的神情
translation_en: Their weathered faces, tanned from years of exposure to wind and sun, betrayed a stern and anxious expression.
translation_zh: 他们的脸庞经过多年暴露在风雨中，已经饱经风霜，表情严肃而焦虑。

sentence: 小小的燕子，浩莽的大海，飞着飞着，不会觉得倦么？不会遇着暴风疾雨么？我们真替它们担心呢
translation_en: The little swallow, the vast ocean, flying along, won't it feel tired? Won't it encounter storms and heavy rain? We really worry about them.
translation_zh: 当小燕飞在浩瀚的大海上时，暴风疾雨难免会遇到，它们不会感到疲惫吗？不会遇到狂风暴雨吗？我们真的很担心它们。

sentence: 生活的艰辛，爱憎的苦恼，使她产生了悲观厌世的情绪
translation_en: The hardships of life, the bitterness of love and hate, have led her to develop a pessimistic and nihilistic outlook on life.
translation_zh: 生活的艰难、爱恨之苦，已使她形成了悲观厌世的态度。

sentence: 悲喜交集的父亲紧紧抱住了久别的儿子
translation_en: A father overcome with both joy and sorrow tightly embraces his long-lost son.
translation_zh: 父亲在看到久别重逢的儿子时，悲喜交集紧紧地拥抱着他。

sentence: 背信弃义是插在我背上的一把尖刀
translation_en: Betraying one's word and principles is like a sharp knife stuck in my back.
translation_zh: 背信弃义如削铁如钢的利刃刺在我背上。

sentence: 女儿刻苦、自觉、用功，全靠笨鸟先飞保持了各门功课全班第一
translation_en: My daughter is diligent, self-disciplined, and hardworking, all thanks to her determination to stay ahead of the rest, which has allowed her to remain at the top of the class in every subject.
translation_zh: 因为她有着超越他人的决心，所以笨鸟先飞，学业成绩一直名列前茅。

sentence: 可以说差不多的人都是逼上梁山的
translation_en: Those who can be said to be similar are all pushed to the point of taking desperate measures.
translation_zh: 那些能说得上相似的人都被逼到要采取绝望的措施。

sentence: 大家彼此彼此，没有什么区别
translation_en: We're all the same, after all.
translation_zh: 我们彼此彼此都是一样的。

sentence: 一个闭目塞听、同客观外界根本绝缘的人，是无所谓认识的
translation_en: Someone who is completely isolated from the objective external world, shutting out all sensory input, is beyond the realm of recognition.
translation_zh: 闭目塞听的人已经超出了认知的范畴。

sentence: 这是我发表的第一篇作品，虽然幼稚，但弊帚自珍，一直藏着
translation_en: This is my first published work, though immature, I still treasure it and have kept it all along.
translation_zh: 虽然这是一部初作，但我仍然把它当作宝贝，至今未曾丢弃。

sentence: 发现和掌握规律，就是从个别中找到了一般，从变动不居的现象中找到了相对稳定的本质
translation_en: Discovering and grasping the rules is to find the general from the particular, to find the essential nature that is relatively stable amidst changing phenomena.
translation_zh: 了解和掌握规则，正如说“变动不居”，是要从具体到抽象，从变化中找出相对稳定的本质。

sentence: 我们不能做表里不一的人
translation_en: We cannot be hypocrites.
translation_zh: 我們不能做假面具。

sentence: 我前信的所谓‘怕闹出麻烦’，先生误会了意思，我是说怕刊物因为我而别生枝节
translation_en: I was worried that my previous letter might cause trouble, but I think you misunderstood what I meant - I was afraid that publishing it would lead to further complications.
translation_zh: 我担心之前的信会引起麻烦，但我想你误解了我的意思——我害怕发表它会导致更多的纠纷别生枝节。

sentence: 他们除双手外，别无长物，其经济地位和产业工人相似
translation_en: Apart from their hands, they have no other means of production, economically similar to industrial workers.
translation_zh: 除了手脚之外，他们别无长物。

sentence: 你就在这儿吧，冰天雪地的上哪儿去
translation_en: You're here, aren't you? Where can we go on such a cold winter day?
translation_zh: 你来这里了吧？在这样的寒冷的冬日，哪里还能去逛逛呢？像是在冰天雪地一样。

sentence: 至此，我们已经获得了充分的谅解，并从心底深处感到在一起谈一谈是件很愉快的事。最初的对立早已冰消雪释了
translation_en: Up to this point, we have gained a full understanding of each other, and from the bottom of our hearts, we feel that talking together is a very pleasant thing. The initial opposition has long since melted away.
translation_zh: 到目前为止，我们对彼此有了充分的了解，从心底里觉得和谈是件非常愉快的事情，初次相持已久的矛盾也早已冰消雪释。

sentence: 我们要讲究饮食卫生，防止病从口入
translation_en: We need to pay attention to food hygiene, preventing illness from entering through our mouths.
translation_zh: 我们必须注意食品卫生，防止病从口入。

sentence: 又是病魔缠身，又是多难的岁月！他又绝望了
translation_en: The illness is back to haunt him, another difficult year has come again! He's lost hope once more.
translation_zh: 病魔缠身，难年又来临，他再次失去希望。

sentence: 这本书的作者一定是位博闻强识的学者
translation_en: This book's author is undoubtedly an erudite scholar with broad knowledge and sharp insight.
translation_zh: 这本书的作者无疑是一位博闻强识的学者，具有广泛的知识和敏锐的见解。

sentence: 世间也尽有不辨菽麦的人
translation_en: There are also people who cannot tell beans from wheat in this world.
translation_zh: 这个世界上也有人不能分辨豆子和麦子。

sentence: 军情紧急，现派你们出发侦察，三小时后必须回来，不得违误
translation_en: Military situation is urgent, you are now dispatched to conduct reconnaissance, please return within three hours, do not fail.
translation_zh: 军情紧急，不能有违误，请立即出发进行侦察，并在三小时内返回，不得延误。

sentence: 一条毛巾或两刀稿纸，咱们还能没地方去‘拿’？拿来送给他，这就叫不费之惠
translation_en: A towel or two sheets of paper, where else can we get something to give him? Giving it to him without asking for anything in return is called a free favor.
translation_zh: 一块毛巾或两张纸，哪里还能找到可以送给他的东西呢？不问报酬地送人东西叫做不费之惠。

sentence: 两位追求者的才学、家世都一样优秀，不分伯仲，让她不知如何抉择
translation_en: Both of these suitors' talents, family backgrounds, were equally outstanding, making it impossible for her to make a choice between them.
translation_zh: 这两位求婚者的才艺、家庭背景都非常出色，难以让她做出选择。

sentence: 有些人为了个人私利，便不顾大局而做出损害公众利益的事情
translation_en: Some people, motivated by personal gain, will disregard the greater good and do things that harm the public interest.
translation_zh: 一些人出于个人利益的驱使，会忽视更大的利益，做出有害于公众利益的事情，不顾大局。

sentence: 尽管有外人在，他还是不管不顾的撞进来了
translation_en: Despite having outsiders around, he still charged right in without hesitation.
translation_zh: 尽管有外人在场，他仍然毫不犹豫地冲了进去，不管不顾。

sentence: 既然他已经承认了错误，我们就可以不咎既往了
translation_en: Since he has already admitted his mistake, we can now let bygones be bygones.
translation_zh: 既然他已经承认了自己的错误，我们就可以不再追究过去的过错。

sentence: 音乐会上，演员的歌声不绝如缕
translation_en: The singer's voice was as smooth as silk throughout the concert.
translation_zh: 歌手的嗓音在整个演唱会上都像丝绸一样光滑，声音不绝如缕。

sentence: 这可以说是不刊之论，我有同感
translation_en: This can be considered an unrefuted argument, I share that sentiment.
translation_zh: 这可以算作是不刊之论，我同感。

sentence: 这篇文章论点不严密，不堪一击
translation_en: This article's argument is not well-reasoned, and it can't withstand criticism.
translation_zh: 这篇文章的论点不够充分，根本就不堪一击。

sentence: 怀疑与猜忌，难道就竟已成了他们不可救药的根性了吗
translation_en: Suspicion and mistrust, have they already become an incurable nature of theirs?
translation_zh: 他们已经养成了不可救药的猜疑和不信任。

sentence: 他的成绩并非不可企及，我们只要奋发努力，一定能赶上他
translation_en: His grades are by no means unattainable, as long as we work hard and make an effort, we can definitely catch up with him.
translation_zh: 他分数并非不可企及，只要我们努力工作，认真努力，我们一定可以赶上他的。

sentence: 一片澄澈的蔚蓝色的天宇，高深得不可思议
translation_en: A vast expanse of crystal-clear blue sky, so profound it's almost incomprehensible.
translation_zh: 一望无边的碧蓝天空，深得不可思议。

sentence: 当时我真悲哀到不可言状
translation_en: I was so heartbroken at that time it's beyond description.
translation_zh: 那时候我心痛到不可言状。

sentence: 不过，他们就得准备实行这样的决议，这是不可移易的
translation_en: However, they will have to implement such a decision, which is irreversible.
translation_zh: 然而，他们必须要执行这样一个不可移易的决定。

sentence: 在他看来，上海的学生娃和山寨的青年之间，是有着一道不可逾越的鸿沟的
translation_en: In his eyes, there is an unbridgeable chasm between Shanghai's students and the young people from rural areas.
translation_zh: 在他眼中，上海学生与农村年轻人之间存在着一个不可逾越的鸿沟。

sentence: 各位以为如何？兄弟说的不对的地方，还请不吝指教
translation_en: How do you think? Please feel free to correct me where I'm wrong.
translation_zh: 我想请问你，哪里不对你可以不吝指教。

sentence: 你看它，埋没地下，不露声色，生命的每一秒种都在为完成自己的使命而苦斗
translation_en: Look at it, buried underground, without making a sound, every second of its life is struggling to fulfill its mission.
translation_zh: 在地下深处，毫无声息地度过每一秒钟，它都在拼命地完成自己的使命，不露声色。

sentence: 我学习写评论性质的文章，给自己立了两个标准。一个是独立思考，另一个是不落俗套
translation_en: I'm learning to write commentaries, setting two standards for myself - independent thinking and avoiding clichés.
translation_zh: 我正在学习写评论，给自己定下了两个标准：独立思考和避免陈词滥调，不落俗套。

sentence: 在确定销售计划之前，应先进行市场调查，以免做出不切实际的预测
translation_en: Before determining sales plans, it is necessary to conduct market research to avoid making unrealistic predictions.
translation_zh: 在确定销售计划之前，必须进行市场调查，以避免做出不切实际的预测。

sentence: 粮食要有充分的储备，以应不时之需
translation_en: There should always be sufficient grain reserves to meet unexpected needs.
translation_zh: 必须储备充足的粮食，以应对不时之需。

sentence: 给你们读一点古书总是好意；古书又不是毒药，竟会这样胡闹起来，这明明是不识好歹呀
translation_en: Reading old books to you is always with good intentions; old books aren't poison, yet they're causing such chaos, it's clear that you don't know how to behave yourself.
translation_zh: 阅读给你的旧书总是出于善意；旧书不是毒药，可是却引起了这么大的混乱，显然你不知道如何自律，不识好歹。

sentence: 什么年月了，还吃这碗饭，太不识时务了
translation_en: It's already what year and month, still eating this bowl of rice, completely out of touch with reality.
translation_zh: 已经到了这个年月了，还在吃这碗饭，完全不识时务。

sentence: 在那时候他们是被骂为不务正业的青年，但没人知道当时的社会已无青年们可务的正业
translation_en: At that time, they were being scolded as idle young people, but no one knew that by then there was no respectable profession left for the youth to pursue.
translation_zh: 当时他们被视为懒散的年轻人，但没有人知道那时候已经没有一个有尊严的职业让年轻人去追求了，不务正业。

sentence: 虽受过多年的感化教育，他仍然不改偷窃的恶习，这样的人已是让人不屑教诲的了
translation_en: Despite having undergone years of reeducation, he still hasn't changed his habit of stealing, people like him have long since become unworthy of being taught.
translation_zh: 尽管经过多年的改造教育，他仍然没有改变偷窃的习惯，像他这样的人早就不值得被教导了，不屑教诲。

sentence: 刚才着了凉的不爽快，也就不药而愈了
translation_en: It was just a minor discomfort, which soon passed on its own without needing treatment.
translation_zh: 这只是轻微的不适，很快就自行缓解，不需要任何治疗。

sentence: 人民群众是历史的创造者，这确是不易之论
translation_en: The people are the creators of history, and this is an undeniable fact.
translation_zh: 历史的创造者是人民，这一点是不容置疑的不易之论。

sentence: 可是人们不由分说，还是狠狠地打了他一顿，还用马刀把所有的布袋都砍破了，把车子也劈掉了
translation_en: However, people didn't even give him a chance to speak, they still beat him up badly, and then used a machete to slash all his bags to pieces, and even chopped up the car.
translation_zh: 然而人家连给他说话的机会都没有，还是打得他很惨，还用砍刀把所有行李都砍成碎片，甚至还砍坏了车子。

sentence: 他的残忍和狠毒，时而不知不觉地在老人面前显露出来
translation_en: His ruthlessness and cruelty occasionally reveal themselves unwittingly before the elderly.
translation_zh: 他的残忍和凶狠偶尔会在老年人面前不知不觉地表现出来。

sentence: 这篇文章逻辑性太差，使人看了不知所云
translation_en: This article lacks logical coherence, leaving readers confused about what it's trying to say.
translation_zh: 这篇文章缺乏逻辑性，读者听了不知所云。

sentence: 我接下这项工程后，才发觉自己有些不知自量
translation_en: After taking on this project, I only then realized that I had underestimated myself.
translation_zh: 在接手这个项目之后，我才意识到自己原来是不知道自量力。

sentence: 对于他所提有关修改方案的提议，完全没有事实根据，不值一驳
translation_en: There is no factual basis for his proposal regarding the modification plan, which is utterly unworthy of refutation.
translation_zh: 没有任何事实依据支持他关于修改方案的提议，这个建议根本不值一驳。

sentence: 那些工作作风实不足为法
translation_en: Those working styles are not worth emulating.
translation_zh: 那些工作方式不值得效仿，不足为法。

sentence: 祝你今年步步高升
translation_en: Wishing you a step up every year this year.
translation_zh: 愿你每年都能步步高升。

sentence: 他在一场车祸中不幸遇难，那场景真是惨不忍睹
translation_en: He met his untimely demise in a tragic car accident, a scene that was truly heart-wrenching to behold.
translation_zh: 他在一场惨不忍睹的车祸中遇到了早逝，令人心碎的画面。

sentence: 这个地方曾经是一个藏污纳垢的黑窝
translation_en: This place was once a den of thieves where evil deeds were committed.
translation_zh: 这个地方曾经是贼窝，藏污纳垢的恶行频繁发生。

sentence: 事情出了岔子的时候，插科打诨，轻松的把责任卸在别人头上
translation_en: When things go wrong, make a joke out of it and shift the blame to someone else with ease.
translation_zh: 当事情出错时，轻松地将责任推给他人，并以笑话的方式应对。

sentence: 要维持民族和国家的长久地位，还有道德问题，有了很好的道德，国家才能长治久安
translation_en: To maintain a nation's long-term status, there is also an issue of morality; with good morals, a country can enjoy lasting peace and stability.
translation_zh: 为了维持一个国家的长期地位，还有道德问题存在；只有做到厚德载物，才能让国家享受长治久安。

sentence: 常备不懈的国防力量是国家安全的保证
translation_en: A strong and steadfast national defense is the guarantee of national security.
translation_zh: 常备不懈的强固国防是国家安全的保证。

sentence: 铲除路面上的积雪，才能使道路再度畅行无阻
translation_en: Removing snow from the road surface is essential for traffic to flow smoothly again.
translation_zh: 为了让交通畅行无阻，清除道路表面积雪至关重要。

sentence: 政策要力求相对地稳定，不能朝令夕改
translation_en: Policies should strive to be relatively stable, and cannot change with every new order.
translation_zh: 政策应力求相对稳定，不要因每个新命令而频繁改变。

sentence: 你们成群结党的来这里干什么
translation_en: What brings you all here together like this?
translation_zh: 你们为什么会像成群结党一样聚集在这里?

sentence: 朋友聚会是有的，为什么要夫妇两个一同去？这算显示你们是成双作对吗
translation_en: There's a gathering with friends, so why do you both have to go together? Does that count as being a pair?
translation_zh: 有朋友聚会，所以你们为什么非要一同前往？这算是成双作对吗？

sentence: 这两段文字中应有几句承上启下的话
translation_en: There should be several sentences that connect the previous passage with this one.
translation_zh: 有几个句子应该连接上一段和这段。

sentence: 文中这句话起到了承先启后的作用
translation_en: This sentence played a crucial role in setting a precedent for future generations.
translation_zh: 这句话在为未来几代人树立了一个重要的典范。

sentence: 我们要乘其不意打击敌人
translation_en: We aim to strike at them when they least expect it.
translation_zh: 我们要乘其不意来打击他们。

sentence: 到了橙黄桔绿的时候，到处都是丰收的景象
translation_en: When oranges turn orange, limes turn green, and lemons ripen to their full color, everywhere is a picture of abundance.
translation_zh: 当橙子变成橙色，柑橘也都呈现出它们的最佳颜色时，处处都是丰收的景象。

sentence: 她是一个逞强好胜的女孩子，一听这话，哪能忍受的下
translation_en: She's a very competitive girl, no way she could put up with this.
translation_zh: 她是一位非常竞争激烈的人，绝不可能容忍这种局面。

sentence: 这种吃里爬外的事，我劝你不要做
translation_en: Don't get yourself involved in something that's going to cause you trouble from all sides.
translation_zh: 不要把自己卷入会从四面八方给你带来麻烦的事情。

sentence: 某报创刊以来，一向持论公允，所以人人爱读它
translation_en: Since its founding, this newspaper has always been known for its fair opinions, so everyone loves to read it.
translation_zh: 自其创立以来，这家报纸一直以持论公允而闻名，所以每个人都喜欢阅读它。

sentence: 由于两汉辞赋的发展，这种侈丽闳衍的写作技巧，给当时文人以一种新的启发
translation_en: Due to the development of Han poetry and rhapsody, this extravagant and ornate writing skill provided contemporary scholars with a new source of inspiration.
translation_zh: 由于汉诗和赋的发展，侈丽闳衍的这门奢华繁缕的写作技巧为当代学者提供了新的灵感来源。

sentence: 头一晚醉得倒下马来，第二天照样冲锋陷阵。不能喝酒，还能当军人吗
translation_en: After getting drunk and falling off his horse on the first night, he still charged into battle the next day. How can someone who can't even handle drinking become a soldier?
translation_zh: 他在第一天喝醉后从马上摔倒，第二天仍然冲锋陷阵地上。怎么会有人连喝酒都办不到就能当兵呢？

sentence: 今天，那美丽的三千里江山还有半壁笼罩着愁云惨雾
translation_en: Even today, that magnificent landscape of three thousand miles still has half shrouded in sorrowful clouds and misty fog.
translation_zh: 直到今天，三千里那片壮丽的风景依然被愁云惨雾笼罩着一半。

sentence: 以初生之犊的勇气，站在一切战斗的前列
translation_en: With the courage of a newborn calf, standing at the forefront of every battle.
translation_zh: 初生之犊勇往直前每战必胜。

sentence: 大学已经毕业了，这正是他雏鹰展翅的时侯
translation_en: He has graduated from university, which is exactly when he spreads his wings to take flight.
translation_zh: 他已经毕业于大学，这是他展开翅膀大展身手的时候。

sentence: 人在触景生情的时候，能联想起很多往事
translation_en: When people see something that evokes memories, they can think of many past events.
translation_zh: 当人们看到触发回忆的东西时，他们就能想起许多过去的往事。

sentence: 平日这灯下，便是我们的天堂；今日却成了地狱了，没有一个地方一件事情，不是使我触目伤心的
translation_en: In ordinary times, this place under the lamp was our paradise; but today it has become hell, where nothing is free from causing me heartache at every glance.
translation_zh: 平时这里灯下就是我们的天堂，但今天却变成了地狱，哪里都触目伤心。

sentence: 欢迎兄弟单位来我厂传经送宝
translation_en: Welcome our brother units to come to my factory to pass on their experience and share their expertise.
translation_zh: 欢迎我们的兄弟单位来到我的工厂，传经送宝他们的经验和专业知识。

sentence: 这个办法可以有吹糠见米的效果
translation_en: This method can have a grain of rice visible effect.
translation_zh: 这方法虽然能看到一粒米的效果，但吹糠见米。

sentence: 春华秋实，没有那浩荡的春风，又哪里会有这满野秋色和大好的收成呢
translation_en: Without that vast spring breeze, how could there even be such an abundance of autumn scenery and a bountiful harvest?
translation_zh: 没有那股春华秋实的气息，怎么会有如此丰富的秋景和丰收呢？

sentence: 春去秋来，他觉得自己真的老了
translation_en: As spring departs and autumn arrives, he feels that he has truly grown old.
translation_zh: 春去秋来，他觉得自己已经老得不成年轻人样了。

sentence: 这两家公司有着多种业务关系，正所谓是唇亡齿寒
translation_en: These two companies have multiple business ties, as they say, one cannot survive without the other.
translation_zh: 这两家公司之间有多重的商业纽带，正如人们常说的那样，唇亡齿寒。

sentence: 据点里的敌人又蠢蠢欲动
translation_en: The enemy within our base is starting to stir again.
translation_zh: 我们的内部敌人开始蠢蠢欲动了。

sentence: 因受的打击太大，他已经辍毫栖牍了
translation_en: He has given up writing altogether due to the heavy blow he received.
translation_zh: 他因受到了重创，彻底放弃了写作。

sentence: 这是一个严肃的问题，决不允许使用村学究语
translation_en: This is a serious matter, under no circumstances can academic jargon be used.
translation_zh: 严格禁止使用学术术语，村学究语不可在此事上苟且偷安。

sentence: 我们厂的领导与群众打得火热
translation_en: Our factory leaders have a very good rapport with the masses.
translation_zh: 工厂领导与群众打得火热。

sentence: 当孩子由于要求没有得到满足而发脾气或打滚撒泼时，大人不要去理睬他
translation_en: When children get angry or throw tantrums because their demands aren't met, adults shouldn't pay them any attention.
translation_zh: 当孩子们因为自己的要求得不到满足而发脾气或打滚撒泼时，成人不应给予他们任何关注。

sentence: 这一回，得看你是不是大彻大悟，决心离开下流社会，迈步走进上流社会了
translation_en: This time, it's up to you to see if you've finally had an epiphany, made up your mind to leave the lower class society behind, and take a step forward into high society.
translation_zh: 这次，完全看你是否已经有了大彻大悟的境界，决定脱离下层社会，迈向上流社会。

sentence: 批评者的眼界是小的，所以他不能在大处落墨
translation_en: The critic's horizon is narrow, so he cannot make a mark on a large scale.
translation_zh: 该评论家的视野狭窄，难以在大处留下墨迹。

sentence: 现在我们进了牢狱便是‘得仁’，那是大错特错
translation_en: Now that we have entered this prison, it is 'to obtain benevolence', which is a grave mistake.
translation_zh: 现在我们已经进入了这个监狱，犯下了大错特错的错误。

sentence: 我一定要报答你的大恩大德
translation_en: I will definitely repay your great kindness.
translation_zh: 我一定会报答你的大恩大德。

sentence: 擎火把的都是年轻的农民，另一只手提着枪，也有拿镐的，大呼小叫的嚷嚷着
translation_en: They're all young peasants carrying torches, one hand holding guns, some with hoes, all shouting loudly.
translation_zh: 他们全是年轻的农民，手里拿着火把，一只手握着枪，有些人还提着锄头，全都大呼小叫地喊着。

sentence: 从一九年以来，她才仿佛从大梦初醒似的，又从事于版画了
translation_en: Since nineteen forty-nine, she seemed to wake up from a big dream and has been engaged in printmaking again.
translation_zh: 自从一九四九年起，她似乎是从一个大梦中初醒过来，重新投入了版画创作。

sentence: 出国留学人员回国后也是大有可为的
translation_en: Overseas students returning to their home country also have much potential.
translation_zh: 回国留学人员同样具有很大的潜力，大有可为。

sentence: 我们很佩服他在处理此事过程中所展示的大智大勇
translation_en: We're very impressed by his great wisdom and courage shown throughout this process.
translation_zh: 他在整个过程中展现出的睿智和胆识令我们深感佩服。

sentence: 那几个军人和财主，一个个呆如木鸡
translation_en: Those soldiers and wealthy merchants stood there like wooden ducks.
translation_zh: 那些士兵和富商们站在那里像呆如木鸡一样。

sentence: 他对事能从各方面看，能有充分的谅解精神，因此他的待人接物都有很合理的态度
translation_en: He can look at things from all angles, has a full understanding spirit, so his behavior towards others is always very reasonable.
translation_zh: 他能从多个角度看待问题，具有豁达的精神，所以他对待他人的行为总是非常合理。

sentence: 我们对此不能淡然处之，要引起高度重视
translation_en: We cannot take this lightly, and it requires our utmost attention.
translation_zh: 我们不能淡然处之，必须全力关注。

sentence: 随着农业机械化的普及，刀耕火种的那种原始的农业耕作技术已逐渐消失了
translation_en: With the widespread adoption of agricultural mechanization, the primitive farming techniques of slash-and-burn have gradually disappeared.
translation_zh: 农业机械化的广泛应用使得原始的刀耕火种方式逐渐消失。

sentence: 那时候，姑姑教给你那‘德言工容’，就大有用处了
translation_en: Back then, Aunt taught you that "De Yan Gong Rong," which was really useful.
translation_zh: 那时候，阿姨教你说“德言工容”，这确实很有用。

sentence: 但是确实存在着这种典型，而且为数相当地多，为害相当地大，不可等闲视之的
translation_en: However, it does indeed exist in this typical form, and there is a considerable number of them, causing significant harm that cannot be taken lightly.
translation_zh: 然而，这种典型的形式确实存在，数量众多，造成了不可小觑的伤害。

sentence: 一看他就知他非等闲之辈
translation_en: At first glance, you can tell he's no ordinary person.
translation_zh: 初看起来，他就不是等闲之辈。

sentence: 想当初，我在城里头作艺，不肯低三下四地侍候有势力的人，教人家打了一顿
translation_en: If only I had known better back then, I used to perform in the city but refused to fawn over influential people by flattering them, which eventually led me to get beaten up by someone.
translation_zh: 如果当时我更有识见的话，我曾在城市表演，但不愿意对权贵阿谀奉承，结果被人打了。

sentence: 同学们在日常学习中，应该有滴水穿石的精神
translation_en: Students should have the spirit of wearing down stone with dripping water in their daily studies.
translation_zh: 学生们应该在日常学习中培养一种滴水穿石的精神。

sentence: 我们希望这种颠倒是非的时代快些过去
translation_en: We hope this era of turning right and wrong on its head will pass soon enough.
translation_zh: 我们希望颠倒是非的这个时期能够尽快过去。

sentence: 我所感到悲哀的，是有几个同我来的学生，至今还找不到学校进，还在颠沛流离
translation_en: What I feel sad about is that several students who came with me still can't find their way to school, and they're still wandering aimlessly.
translation_zh: 他们跟着我来的几个学生仍然找不到去学校的路，东跑西颠沛流离。

sentence: 奶奶年岁大了，做起事来常常是颠三倒四的
translation_en: Grandma is getting older, she often gets things mixed up when doing tasks.
translation_zh: 老太太越来越年迈，常常颠三倒四地做事。

sentence: 还没成人，就叫他自己顶门立户，自己奔日子
translation_en: He's still a child, but he has to take care of himself and make a living on his own.
translation_zh: 他还是个孩子，但已经顶门立户，必须自己照顾自己并谋生。

sentence: 在动荡不定的岁月里，他始终保持这个良好习惯
translation_en: In the tumultuous years, he has always maintained this good habit.
translation_zh: 在动荡不定的岁月里，他始终保持着这个好的习惯。

sentence: 每个青年都应该努力向上，刻苦学习，使自己成为国家的栋梁之才
translation_en: Every young person should strive to excel, work hard at their studies, and become a pillar of strength for the nation.
translation_zh: 每个年轻人都应努力成为栋梁之才，刻苦学习，成为国家的支柱。

sentence: 我不害怕你的毒手尊拳
translation_en: I'm not afraid of your poisonous fist.
translation_zh: 你以为你的毒手尊拳能吓到我吗？

sentence: 他也不信任母亲，有意见就独断独行
translation_en: He also doesn't trust his mother, he makes decisions on his own whenever he has an opinion.
translation_zh: 他也不信任他的母亲，总是独断独行，自己做决定。

sentence: 我们要有钝学累功的精神才能有所进步
translation_en: We need to have a spirit of persistent hard work in order to make progress.
translation_zh: 为了取得进步，我们必须有钝学累功的精神。

sentence: 过去，我多愁善感，看什么都没有意思；父母对我不好，引起我对世界上一切都憎恨
translation_en: In the past, I was overly sentimental and easily moved to tears by anything; my parents were cruel to me, which made me despise everything in this world.
translation_zh: 过去我太多愁善感，容易为任何事情落泪；父母对我的待遇很残酷，这使得我对这个世界的一切都产生了厌恶之情。

sentence: 现在这样的局面，我们是有办法对付的，要迎接困难，多难兴邦
translation_en: Now that we're facing this situation, we have ways to deal with it, and we should welcome challenges as opportunities for growth.
translation_zh: 现在我们面对这种情况，我们有应对的方法，而且应该把挑战视为成长的机遇，多难兴邦。

sentence: 谁都明白多钱善贾的道理
translation_en: Everyone understands the logic of making money by doing good business.
translation_zh: 人人都明白做好生意赚钱的道理，多钱善贾。

sentence: 这一点事，也值得你躲躲闪闪老半天总不肯说
translation_en: This one thing is also worth you dodging and weaving for half a day before finally deciding not to say it.
translation_zh: 这件事值得你花半天时间来躲躲闪闪才决定不说。

sentence: 饿殍载道的灾后景象是不会再出现了
translation_en: The post-disaster scene of famine-stricken refugees on the road will never happen again.
translation_zh: 饿殍载道的景象再也不会出现。

sentence: 她完全没有读过书，但她单凭耳濡目染，也认得一些字，而且能够暗诵得好些唐诗
translation_en: She has never read a book, but she can recognize some characters just by being exposed to them, and is also able to recite several Tang poems from memory.
translation_zh: 她从未读过书，但耳濡目染后能认出一些字，甚至能背诵几首唐诗。

sentence: 最合理的孝道恐怕是继承父辈的成就，把它发扬光大，好教下一辈得到更好的精神的与物质的遗产
translation_en: The most reasonable filial piety is probably to inherit one's parents' achievements, promote them, and pass on better spiritual and material legacies to the next generation.
translation_zh: 最合理的孝道可能是继承父母的成就，发扬光大他们的精神和物质遗产，让下一代受益。

sentence: 谁个惩办要严，谁个处罚从轻，农民都有极明白的计算，罚不当罪的极少
translation_en: Whoever metes out severe punishment, whoever gives lenient penalties, peasants all have very clear calculations, few are punished for crimes they did not commit.
translation_zh: 谁soever严厉处罚，谁soever宽大发落，农民们都有很清晰的计算，极少有人因无罪而受罚。

sentence: 我们不希望看到法出多门的局面
translation_en: We do not want to see a situation where there are multiple laws.
translation_zh: 我们不希望看到有多个法门的局面。

sentence: 我国的戏剧艺术越来越繁荣昌盛了
translation_en: The drama art of our country is becoming increasingly prosperous and thriving.
translation_zh: 我们的国家戏剧艺术正在逐渐繁荣昌盛。

sentence: 我们都有反哺之私，赡养老人是天职
translation_en: We all have a sense of reciprocity, taking care of our elderly is a heavenly duty.
translation_zh: 我们都有相互帮助的意识，照顾老人是一种天赋的责任，反哺之私。

sentence: 经过反复推敲，我们终于选择了这个方案
translation_en: After repeated deliberation, we have finally chosen this plan.
translation_zh: 经过反复推敲，我们终于选择了这个方案。

sentence: 这次事故，你是有责任的，你应该反躬自省
translation_en: This time, you bear responsibility for the accident; you should reflect on yourself.
translation_zh: 这次事故的责任你要承担，你应该反躬自省。

sentence: 这并不是外来的异物，而是泛应曲当的真理
translation_en: This is not something foreign, but rather the truth that resonates with our times.
translation_zh: 这不是外来之物，而是与时代相吻合的真理。

sentence: 当他听到这个不利的消息后，显得仿徨失措
translation_en: When he heard this unfavorable news, he seemed utterly at a loss.
translation_zh: 当他听了这个不利的消息时，他似乎完全陷入了仿徨失措的困境。

sentence: 对中小学生的校外活动，要加强辅导，不能放任自流
translation_en: Supervising extracurricular activities for middle school students should be strengthened, and they cannot be left to their own devices.
translation_zh: 加强中学生课外活动的管理，不能让他们放任自流。

sentence: 我羡慕那种飞遁离俗的隐居生活
translation_en: I envy that carefree, reclusive life of flight from worldly concerns.
translation_zh: 我羡慕那样的飞遁离俗的生活，远离世俗的烦恼。

sentence: 这对他来说就像飞龙乘云一样
translation_en: It's like riding on dragons through the clouds to him.
translation_zh: 对他来说，像是在飞龙乘云一样。

sentence: 你不能对她有非分之念
translation_en: You should not have any improper thoughts about her.
translation_zh: 你不应该对她有非分之念。

sentence: 对于她的日夜的操心，使我也不能不一同操心，来算作分甘共苦
translation_en: Her constant worrying day and night has made me worry too, so I share her joys and sorrows.
translation_zh: 她每天都在担心，我的心也跟着忧虑，所以我与她一起分享喜乐和悲伤。

sentence: 我们彼此之间感情不和，早已分路扬镳了
translation_en: We don't get along with each other emotionally, and we've long since gone our separate ways.
translation_zh: 我们感情上不和谐，早已各走一条路分道扬镳。

sentence: 这个东西分文不值
translation_en: This thing is worth nothing at all.
translation_zh: 这件事根本分文不值。

sentence: 有着粉饰太平的职责的人们是可原谅的，因为他们也有理由麻木
translation_en: Those who have the responsibility to whitewash everything can be forgiven, as they also have reason to be numb.
translation_zh: 有权利粉饰太平的人，既能得到宽恕，也有理由麻木。

sentence: 我们用自己动手的方法，达到了丰衣足食的目的
translation_en: We achieved our goal of being well-fed and well-clothed through our own hard work.
translation_zh: 我们通过自己的努力，实现了丰衣足食的目标。

sentence: 过去被忘却了的煤堆，风吹日晒，现在忽然大家争着去把他团成煤球收藏起来
translation_en: The old piles of coal that were once forgotten, now blown away by the wind and dried out in the sun, have suddenly become highly sought after to be formed into coal balls for collection.
translation_zh: 风吹日晒的旧煤堆，曾经被遗忘，现在被风吹散、日晒干燥，突然变得极为受欢迎，以便形成煤球进行收藏。

sentence: 南国的春天风光旖旎，使人陶醉
translation_en: The southern region's spring scenery is breathtaking, leaving one enchanted.
translation_zh: 风光旖旎的南方春景令人深感迷恋。

sentence: 戒严令风行雷厉。不准集会，也不准罢课
translation_en: A strict ban is enforced with swift punishment. No gatherings, no school strikes allowed.
translation_zh: 严格禁止聚会、学校罢课，违者必受迅速严厉的处罚。

sentence: 难以想象，他是怎样渡过那风雨交加的日子的
translation_en: It's hard to imagine how he managed to get through those stormy days.
translation_zh: 他在风雨交加的日子里是如何熬过来的，简直难以想象。

sentence: 我们办事要认真负责，不应采取敷衍了事的态度
translation_en: We need to handle things seriously and responsibly, and should not adopt an attitude of glossing over problems.
translation_zh: 我们必须认真负责地处理事情，不得采取敷衍了事的态度。

sentence: 在这篇作品中，突出体现了主人公为人民扶危济困的英雄主义气概
translation_en: In this work, it particularly highlights the heroism of the protagonist who comes to the aid of the people in times of need.
translation_zh: 在这部作品中，尤其突出了那些在百姓需要帮助时挺身而出、扶危济困的英雄主义精神。

sentence: 我是愿意人对我反抗，不合则拂袖而去
translation_en: I am willing to accept opposition from others, but if things don't go my way, I will walk away.
translation_zh: 我愿意接受他人反对，但如果事情不如我所愿，我会拂袖而去。

sentence: 他们习惯于猛于虎的官威，以为老百姓只要一加威吓，便自会俯首帖耳
translation_en: They are accustomed to using official authority like a tiger, thinking that as long as they intimidate ordinary people, they will naturally submit.
translation_zh: 他们习惯用权威如虎是威，认为只要吓唬普通人就能使他们俯首帖耳。

sentence: 不甘心做俯仰由人的傀儡
translation_en: I am unwilling to be a puppet controlled by others, with my fate determined by their whims.
translation_zh: 我不愿成为他人操控的木偶，命运完全取决于他们的意志。

sentence: 该公司由于连年亏损，负债累累，不久便宣告倒闭
translation_en: The company has been plagued by annual losses, weighed down by heavy debt, and soon went bankrupt.
translation_zh: 公司因年复一年亏损，负债累累，最后陷入了破产的困境。

sentence: 写文章应力求简洁，一切附赘悬疣尽量删除
translation_en: When writing articles, strive for simplicity and eliminate all unnecessary details as much as possible.
translation_zh: 当写文章时，应尽量避免附赘悬疣，保持简洁。

sentence: 父亲到处寻找着富国强民的救国良策，但他终于没有找到
translation_en: The father searched everywhere for a salvation plan to enrich the country and strengthen its people, but he was ultimately unable to find one.
translation_zh: 父亲遍寻各路救星，希望能找到富国强民的良策，但最终还是找不到。

sentence: 他只有奋力冲上这座山峰，才有可能摆脱腹背受敌的困境
translation_en: He can only overcome this predicament by making a desperate bid to climb to the top of the mountain.
translation_zh: 他只有采取极端的行动，才能在腹背受敌的情况下爬到山顶。

sentence: 在过去说来，她这个小命运已是被盖棺论定了，然而在今天，这一切都要重新估计
translation_en: In retrospect, her fate was long considered sealed, but everything is up for reevaluation today.
translation_zh: 在回顾过去之后，人们早已认为她的命运已经被盖棺论定，但如今一切都需要重新评估。

sentence: 她是负有使命的人，都是罄着所有生命之力在奔跑，他也就不愿甘居人后了
translation_en: She is someone with a mission, who pours all her life force into running, so she wouldn't want to fall behind others either.
translation_zh: 她是一位有使命感的人，倾注所有生命力于奔跑中，所以也不愿甘居人后。

sentence: 还必须使全国广大人民群众觉悟，甘心情愿和我们一起奋斗，去争取胜利
translation_en: It is still necessary to make the entire nation's broad masses of people aware, willing and happy to struggle with us together, and strive for victory.
translation_zh: 让整个民族的广大群众甘心情愿与我们一起奋斗，共同努力争取胜利。

sentence: 我们只有使自己操练得高人一等，才有战略胜利的可能
translation_en: We can only achieve strategic victory by training ourselves to excel above others.
translation_zh: 我们只有通过训练自己超过他人才能实现战略性的胜利。

sentence: 他们的切身的问题，也使他们无暇去高瞻远瞩的去关心与分析世界问题
translation_en: Their personal problems also leave them no time to concern themselves with and analyze global issues.
translation_zh: 他们的个人问题也使得他们无暇顾及和分析全球问题。

sentence: 我不习惯这种膏粱纨裦般的生活
translation_en: I'm not accustomed to this indulgent and pampered way of life.
translation_zh: 我不习惯这种膏粱纨裦的生活方式。

sentence: 卖糖小孩在我面前的地位，正如我在膏腴子弟面前的地位一样
translation_en: The position of the candy seller in front of me is just like my own position in front of the privileged children.
translation_zh: 在我面前的糖果贩子位置，正如我自己站在有特权的孩子面前的位置。

sentence: 国家要稳步向前发展，就必须革奸铲暴，创造一个良好的社会环境
translation_en: For the country to develop steadily forward, it is necessary to root out corruption and violence, create a good social environment.
translation_zh: 为了让国家能够稳步前进，必须革除奸臣、铲除暴政，营造良好的社会环境。

sentence: 全国人民都要有说话的机会，都要有衣穿，有饭吃，有事做，有书读，总之是要各得其所
translation_en: Every single person across the country should have the chance to speak, wear clothes, eat food, do things, read books, and generally get what they need.
translation_zh: 每个人的需求都应得到满足，各人都能说出自己的声音，穿上适合自己衣服，吃到自己喜欢的食物，做好自己想做的事，读到自己感兴趣的书籍，获得自己需要的东西。

sentence: 儿童乐园里的玩具各式各样，真是好玩极了
translation_en: The toys in the children's playground come in all shapes and sizes, it's really a lot of fun.
translation_zh: 孩子们的游乐场里玩具形态各异大小不一，真的是非常有趣。

sentence: 后来他们被敌人隔开，各自为战
translation_en: They were later separated by their enemies, each fighting on their own.
translation_zh: 他们各自为战，后来被敌人分隔开。

sentence: 这真是亘古新闻
translation_en: This is truly news that will go down in history.
translation_zh: 这将是历史上永垂不朽的重大新闻。

sentence: 同学之间应团结互助，绝不能因一点小事就耿耿于怀
translation_en: Fellow students should unite and help each other, absolutely cannot harbor resentment over something as trivial as this.
translation_zh: 同学们应该团结一致互相帮助，不能耿耿于怀这种微不足道的小事。

sentence: 这两幅山水画工力悉敌，很难分出高下
translation_en: These two landscape paintings show equal skill, making it hard to tell which one is superior.
translation_zh: 这两幅风景画展现出同等的技艺，难以判断哪一幅更为出色。

sentence: 你不至于被这狗吠之惊所吓倒吧
translation_en: Don't you get startled by this dog's barking?
translation_zh: 你不怕狗吠之惊吗？

sentence: 这不过姑妄言之罢了，哪一个能办这件事
translation_en: It's just idle talk, after all, who can actually accomplish this task.
translation_zh: 姑妄言之，谁也无法真正完成这项任务。

sentence: 我们已经脱离了过去那种慢慢发展的孤军作战的情况
translation_en: We have now broken away from that kind of slow development as lone rangers.
translation_zh: 我们已经脱离了那种孤军作战的慢发展模式。

sentence: 你可以从明亮的窗玻璃后面看到古色古香的字画、瓷器、铜鼎和小铜佛等等
translation_en: You can see ancient calligraphy, ceramics, bronze cauldrons, and small bronze Buddhas from behind the bright windowpane.
translation_zh: 你可以从透亮的玻璃窗后面看到古色古香的古代书法、陶瓷器皿、铜锅和小铜佛像。

sentence: 研究古典文学要坚持古为今用的原则
translation_en: Studying classical literature requires adhering to the principle of using ancient works for modern purposes.
translation_zh: 学习古典文学需要遵循“古为今用”的原则。

sentence: 一对盗贼故伎重演，但被当场抓获
translation_en: A pair of thieves repeated their old tricks, but were caught on the spot.
translation_zh: 一对小偷故伎重演，结果被当场抓住。

sentence: 身为政府官员，关心民瘼当为本职
translation_en: As a government official, it is one's duty to care about the people's suffering.
translation_zh: 作为一名政府官员，关心民瘼是自己的职责。

sentence: 如此广土众民的国家说财政经济无办法，真是没有道理的话
translation_en: It's really unbelievable that such a vast country with so many people can say it has no way to manage its finances economically.
translation_zh: 这样的一个面积广阔、人口众多的国家居然说自己没有办法管理经济，实在令人难以置信。

sentence: 从此故乡日离日远，我们几个人，看这光景，不知还有归正首丘的日子么
translation_en: From this day on, our hometown is farther and farther away from us; we few people look at this scene, wondering if there will ever be a day to return to our ancestral home again.
translation_zh: 从此日起，我们的家乡离我们越来越远了；我们这些人看着这一幕，心中不禁想：能否有朝一日能够归正首丘。

sentence: 这点如不弄明了，简直等于是海中捞月一样了
translation_en: If this isn't clarified, it's like trying to scoop up the moon from the sea.
translation_zh: 如果没有明确说明，这就像是在海中捞月。

sentence: 他想起母亲十多年来含辛茹苦的生活所指望者，就是他，然而现在她将不再看见他的儿子了
translation_en: He remembered that for over ten years, his mother had endured hardships with hope pinned on him, but now she would no longer see her son again.
translation_zh: 他记得母亲十多年来一直以希望寄托在他身上，含辛茹苦地等待着，但现在她再也不会见到儿子了。

sentence: 冷锋过境，寒风侵肌，人们尽量不出门，致使娱乐场所生意清淡
translation_en: A cold front is passing through, bringing biting winds that seep into one's bones, prompting people to stay indoors as much as possible, resulting in a slow business day for entertainment venues.
translation_zh: 寒风侵肌，冷空气通过，带来刺骨的寒风，让人们尽量待在家里，导致娱乐场所的生意十分冷清。

sentence: 在劳动竞赛中，大家干得汗流浃背
translation_en: Everyone sweats blood in this labor competition.
translation_zh: 在这个劳动竞赛中，大家都要汗流浃背。

sentence: 古人所渴想的诗境是具现在眼前来了，是豪情逸致吗？不，一点也不
translation_en: Is this poetic world that our ancestors yearned for, one of grandeur and carefree abandon? Not at all.
translation_zh: 这不是我们祖先梦寐以求的豪情逸致世界。

sentence: 好梦难圆，你不要白费功夫了
translation_en: It's hard to have a good dream, you shouldn't waste your effort.
translation_zh: 好梦难圆，勿以力行。

sentence: 我们要把这两个车间合二为一
translation_en: We want to merge these two workshops into one.
translation_zh: 我们希望将这两个研讨会合并成一个。

sentence: 我很为你恳挚纯真的感情，无保留合盘托出的气度和敏锐深入的思考所打动
translation_en: I am deeply moved by your genuine emotions, unreservedly expressed with an air of sincerity and profound insight that cuts to the heart of things.
translation_zh: 我深受您的真情实意所感动，完全展现了坦率和诚挚的态度，切中要害。

sentence: 学校认为这个方案合情合理，就定为制度
translation_en: The school believes this plan is reasonable, so it has been made into a regulation.
translation_zh: 学校认为这个计划是合情合理的，所以把它制成了一项规定。

sentence: 这件事对国家对个人都有益处，何乐不为
translation_en: This matter is beneficial to both the country and individuals, why not take advantage of it.
translation_zh: 何乐不为这件事对国家和个人都有利，为什么不趁机利用呢？

sentence: 假若有人愿意来看他，他是个顶和蔼可亲的人
translation_en: If someone were willing to come visit him, he is a very affable person.
translation_zh: 如果有人愿意来拜访他，他就是一个和蔼可亲的人。

sentence: 邻里之间应当团结友爱，和睦相处
translation_en: Neighborhoods should unite and show mutual affection, living harmoniously with one another.
translation_zh: 各个邻里应该团结一致、和睦相处，彼此间充满爱意，和谐共处。

sentence: 老人一辈子最重要的格言是‘和气生财’
translation_en: The most important saying of one's lifetime is 'harmony brings wealth'.
translation_zh: 一辈子中最重要的话就是和气生财。

sentence: 他见了启事便跑到书店里来，谈了些和衷共济的话
translation_en: He saw the notice and immediately ran to the bookstore, where he talked about unity and cooperation.
translation_zh: 他看到通知后立即跑到书店，和衷共济地与店员讨论团结与合作。

sentence: 可是社会和家庭一样，依然到处发着腐朽霉烂的臭味，黑漆一团
translation_en: However, just like society and family, it's still reeking of decay and rot everywhere, a dark and dismal mess.
translation_zh: 然而，社会和家庭一样，到处弥漫着腐朽和烂泥的味道，黑漆一团的混乱。

sentence: 他横眉立眼的冲着老教师说‘她不来吗，这也只少得到她一个人啦，跟我们开不开会有好大关系呢？’
translation_en: He raised an eyebrow and looked straight at the old teacher, saying 'Won't she come? It's really just one person short of her; whether we have a meeting or not will make a big difference.'
translation_zh: 他扬起了眉毛，直视着老老师，说：“她不会来吗？只差一个人，她来了不来了，会使得很大的区别。”

sentence: 床下横七竖八有几双花鞋
translation_en: Under the bed, there were several pairs of shoes scattered all over the place.
translation_zh: 床底下乱七八糟地散落着好几双鞋子。

sentence: 这位老画家善于用烘云托月的笔法描画山水
translation_en: This elderly painter is skilled at using expressive brushstrokes to depict landscapes.
translation_zh: 这位老画家擅长用富有表现力的笔触来烘云托月，描绘出壮丽的风景。

sentence: 我居然逃过了这一关，真是洪福齐天，就是每年开一次庆祝会也不算过分
translation_en: I narrowly escaped this ordeal, what a stroke of good fortune it is, even having a celebration once a year wouldn't be excessive.
translation_zh: 我险些逃过这场劫难，幸好遇到一次大吉大利的机会，哪怕每年都能举办一次庆祝活动也不过分。

sentence: 这孩子一点规矩也不懂，猴头猴脑的
translation_en: This child doesn't understand even the most basic rules, it's monkey-like in its behavior.
translation_zh: 这个孩子连最基本的规则都无法理解，行为像个猴头猴脑。

sentence: 做事要小心，万一出了什么意外就后悔莫及了
translation_en: Be careful when doing things, lest you regret it afterwards if something unexpected happens.
translation_zh: 当做事时要谨慎，若不幸遇到意外情况，后悔莫及。

sentence: 任何一个学科都不可后继无人
translation_en: No field of study can go without successors.
translation_zh: 没有后继无人的学科是不存在的。

sentence: 这才囫囵半片地听出点意思
translation_en: I finally managed to catch on to what they were saying.
translation_zh: 我终于听懂他们在说什么了，像吃到了一口囫囵半片。

sentence: 我听说那人喝醉了酒，心里倒宽了不少，胡作胡为都不由他的意思，我们又何必怪他
translation_en: I heard that person had drunk too much, his heart felt lighter by quite a bit, he did whatever he wanted without thinking, so why should we blame him.
translation_zh: 听说那个人喝了太多，胡作胡为的样子，让人觉得他心情轻松很多，不再考虑后果，所以我们为什么要责怪他呢。

sentence: 糊里糊涂是办不好事的
translation_en: Being unclear-headed is no good for doing things.
translation_zh: 糊里糊涂的人做事并不是什么好主意。

sentence: 这个小男孩长得虎头虎脑，非常可爱
translation_en: This little boy has a strong build, he's very cute.
translation_zh: 这个小男孩身材强壮，像个虎头虎脑的小精灵。

sentence: 于是文章也就不能划一不二，可说之处说一点，不能说之处便罢休
translation_en: Thus, the article can no longer be one-sided; where it can be said, say something, but where it cannot be said, just drop it.
translation_zh: 因此，文章不能再是一边倒的；说得出口的地方就说点什么，但说不出口的地方就别说了。

sentence: 她听出话里有话，怕嚷下去再被人掀出丑来，就咕噜着走了
translation_en: She sensed there was more to what she heard, fearing that if it got out, her reputation would be ruined, so she slunk away quietly.
translation_zh: 她感觉到听到的不仅是表面上的内容，害怕如果泄露出来，她的名声会被毁掉，所以她悄悄地溜走了。

sentence: 消息传来，大家立刻欢呼雀跃起来
translation_en: The news arrived, and everyone immediately erupted into cheers and applause.
translation_zh: 新闻传来后，大家立即爆发出欢呼雀跃的声浪。

sentence: 误解和偏见并不能随着时间的推移而涣然冰释
translation_en: Misconceptions and biases cannot simply melt away with the passage of time.
translation_zh: 误解和偏见不能简单地随着时间的流逝而涣然冰释。

sentence: 然而正感谢有这一些的打，你把铁打成了钢，把泛泛的朋友都打成了患难之交了
translation_en: However, it's thanks to these hardships that you've tempered steel from iron and turned casual friends into true companions through adversity.
translation_zh: 然而，正是因为这些困难使你能够在患难之交中锻炼出钢铁般的友谊，并将平常朋友转化为真正的知己。

sentence: 如果不早作准备，来年汛期患至呼天，就来不及了
translation_en: If we don't prepare early, by next year's flood season, it will be too late to save them.
translation_zh: 如果我们不早做准备，到明年洪水季节来临时，已经是求救无门了。

sentence: 对于这种荒诞无稽的传闻，大家都不可相信
translation_en: No one can believe such absurd and baseless rumors.
translation_zh: 荒诞无稽的谣言根本令人难以置信。

sentence: 只要他们认破迷津，那便回头是岸
translation_en: As long as they recognize their mistakes, then turning back is like reaching solid ground.
translation_zh: 只要他们认清自己的错误，就像回头是岸一样。

sentence: 这篇文章含义深刻，使人回味无穷
translation_en: This article has profound meaning, leaving readers with endless aftertastes.
translation_zh: 这篇文章的深意令人回味无穷。

sentence: 对自己的错误和缺点，决不可讳莫高深，应该去寻求他人的帮助并尽快改正
translation_en: One should never turn a blind eye to one's own mistakes and shortcomings, but instead seek help from others and correct them as soon as possible.
translation_zh: 要对自己犯的错误和缺点视而不见是很危险的，必须谨记谎言怕被揭穿，真相怕被人知道。

sentence: 那些人经常故意混淆视听，影响很坏
translation_en: Those people often intentionally create confusion, which has a very bad impact.
translation_zh: 那些人经常故意制造混淆视听，造成了非常不好的影响。

sentence: 祸不单行，那个私立中学因为吃了一家钱庄的倒帐，发不出薪水了
translation_en: Trouble doesn't come alone, that private high school is unable to pay its teachers because it got stuck with a bad debt from a moneylender.
translation_zh: 祸不单行，私立高中因欠下一家钱庄的巨额债务而无法支付教师薪水。

sentence: 第八条罪状是传播出去，祸国殃民
translation_en: The eighth charge is to spread chaos and bring calamity upon the people.
translation_zh: 祸国殃民的第八条罪状是要散布混乱，带来灾难给百姓。

sentence: 想开点，别灰心。祸绝福连，会好起来的
translation_en: Don't give up, things will get better.
translation_zh: 祸绝福连，坚持下去会有好的结果。

sentence: 有些文字，尤其是所谓直译的文字，写得佶屈聱牙
translation_en: Some words, especially those that claim to be literal translations, are awkwardly phrased.
translation_zh: 有些词语，尤其是那些自称为字面翻译的词语，表达起来很不自然，像佶屈聱牙。

sentence: 人们站在这幅照片前，感到一种急流勇进的撼人力量
translation_en: People stand before this photograph, feeling an electrifying sense of boldness and courage.
translation_zh: 在面对这张照片时，人们会感到一种电气般的勇敢和胆识，仿佛要做出急流勇进的壮举。

sentence: 高考的日子已经可以计日而待了，大家要认真复习
translation_en: The days of the high school entrance exam are finally here, everyone needs to study seriously now.
translation_zh: 高考的日子终于来了，每个人都必须认真学习了，等得就是这一天。

sentence: 对于既成事实的婚姻，我们要通过法律手段解决
translation_en: We need to resolve established marriages through legal means.
translation_zh: 我们需要通过法律手段来解决既成的事实。

sentence: 许多人过去有大学问，在社会上有地位，今日却寂寂无闻
translation_en: Many people in the past were well-educated, held high social status, but today they are unknown and forgotten.
translation_zh: 过去那些受过良好教育、社会地位高的人们，如今已被人遗忘，成了寂寂无闻的历史人物。

sentence: 她自己隐瞒了两匹次布，还假痴假呆地向人家做报告
translation_en: She concealed two pieces of fabric for herself, and pretended to be foolishly reporting it to others.
translation_zh: 她把两块布料藏在自己身边，装作愚蠢地向别人报告。

sentence: 我们将坚持不渝地支持你的正义行动
translation_en: We will unwaveringly support your just cause.
translation_zh: 我们将坚持不渝地支持您的正义事业。

sentence: 平常是异常清静的街面，到这时候两边的街檐便成为肩摩踵接的市场了
translation_en: It's usually an unusually quiet street scene, but at this time, the two sides of the street awnings have become shoulder-to-shoulder market stalls.
translation_zh: 这条街通常是异常安静的景象，但是在这个时候，两边的阳台已经变成了肩摩踵接的市场摊位。

sentence: 南极考察队的队员们，战胜了各种艰难险阻，终于完成了考察任务
translation_en: Members of the Antarctic expedition team overcame numerous difficulties and challenges, ultimately completing their research mission.
translation_zh: 团队成员在面临众多艰难险阻的情况下克服了各种困难，最后完成了他们的研究任务。

sentence: 在科学研究方面，基础科学知识和应用科学知识应该兼而有之
translation_en: In scientific research, both fundamental scientific knowledge and applied scientific knowledge should coexist.
translation_zh: 科学研究中，基础科学知识和应用科学知识应该兼而有之。

sentence: 俭以养廉看起来容易，做起来难
translation_en: Living frugally to cultivate integrity seems easy, but it's hard to put into practice.
translation_zh: 俭以养廉似乎很容易做到，但实际操作起来却非常困难。

sentence: 她是每天上街去买菜的，自然见多识广，知道这东西的时价
translation_en: She is someone who goes to the market every day to buy vegetables, so she's naturally well-informed about prices.
translation_zh: 她每天都去市场买菜，见多识广，所以对价格自然很了解。

sentence: 一年之后，附近几个村庄的牧童们没有一个有她吹的好，连大人们也交口称赞
translation_en: A year later, none of the shepherd boys from nearby villages could blow as well as her, even the adults were all praising her.
translation_zh: 一年后，附近村庄的牧羊少年们都无法与她吹得一样好，连大人们也都交口称赞她的吹法。

sentence: 满城的彩灯与腾空的焰火交相辉映
translation_en: The city's colorful lanterns and soaring fireworks illuminate each other.
translation_zh: 城市的色彩缤纷的灯笼和绽放的烟花在交相辉映中照亮了彼此。

sentence: 碰到这个难题，他绞尽脑汁也想不出解决的办法来
translation_en: He racked his brain but couldn't come up with a solution to this problem.
translation_zh: 他绞尽脑汁也想不出这个问题的解决方案。

sentence: 本来，有关本业的东西，是无论怎样节衣缩食也应该购买的
translation_en: Essentially, things related to one's profession are worth investing in no matter how tight the budget is.
translation_zh: 无论财政紧张，职业相关的东西都值得投资。

sentence: 直到近来，经过许多学者的研究，才知道孩子的世界，与成人截然不同
translation_en: Until recently, through many scholars' research, it has been realized that children's world is vastly different from adults'.
translation_zh: 直到最近，通过许多学者的研究才意识到儿童的世界与成人截然不同。

sentence: 为了办好这所学校，大家都是竭力虔心地工作着
translation_en: Everyone is working hard with utmost dedication to run this school well.
translation_zh: 竭力虔心地为学校努力工作。

sentence: 竭智尽力，求得这种最大的贡献
translation_en: Striving with all one's might, to achieve this greatest contribution.
translation_zh: 竭智尽力地为此做出最大贡献。

sentence: 每当同学有困难时，老师总是解囊相助
translation_en: Whenever classmates have difficulties, teachers always lend a helping hand.
translation_zh: 当同学们遇到困难时，老师总是解囊相助。

sentence: 你站在这桌子上，金鸡独立，那一条腿不许放下来
translation_en: You're standing on this table, the rooster stands proudly with one leg raised, that one leg is never to be put down.
translation_zh: 你站在这张桌子上，金鸡独立，举起一条腿，绝不把那条腿放下。

sentence: 不信你长个金口玉牙！我故意从屋里取来秤一称
translation_en: Don't believe you've grown gold teeth and jade lips! I deliberately took the scale from inside to weigh it.
translation_zh: 你以为自己长了金口玉牙，实际上还是在瞎掰，我故意从里头拿出秤来称它。

sentence: 为什么叫麻烦？你的锦囊妙计在哪里呢
translation_en: What's all this fuss about? Where is your brilliant plan?
translation_zh: 你到底有没有锦囊妙计？

sentence: 他费了一生心血收藏的集邮册子，在水灾时尽付东流
translation_en: A lifetime's collection of stamps, painstakingly gathered by him, was swept away by the floodwaters.
translation_zh: 他一生收集的邮票，经过千辛万苦才积累起来，却被洪水冲走了。

sentence: 吸烟有害健康，这是尽人皆知的事实
translation_en: Smoking is bad for one's health, this is a well-known fact.
translation_zh: 烟草对健康有害，这是人人都知道的事实。

sentence: 所谓有‘价值’，是必须使人看了在‘进德修业’上得到多少的‘灵感’
translation_en: What is meant by having "value" is that one gains how much inspiration on the path of cultivating virtue and practicing studies after seeing it.
translation_zh: 什么是“价值”之意，正是指在进德修业的道路上看到它后，能够获得多少灵感。

sentence: 在我自己的思想上也正感受着一种进退维谷的苦闷
translation_en: I am also feeling a sense of being at a loss for what to do, stuck between advancing and retreating in my own thoughts.
translation_zh: 我也感到自己进退维谷，无法确定前进还是后退的方向。

sentence: 会场响起经久不息的掌声
translation_en: The hall erupted into prolonged applause.
translation_zh: 大厅爆发出持久的掌声。

sentence: 遇到危险情况，应该沉着冷静，不要惊慌失措
translation_en: When encountering dangerous situations, one should remain calm and composed, and avoid panicking.
translation_zh: 遇到危险的情况时，应保持冷静和镇定，不要惊慌失措。

sentence: 这个贝雕画确实是精雕细刻
translation_en: This ivory carving is indeed an exquisite work of art.
translation_zh: 这件象牙雕刻确实是一件精雕细刻的艺术杰作。

sentence: 少数民族的手工艺品真是精美绝伦
translation_en: The handicrafts of minority ethnic groups are truly exquisite and unparalleled.
translation_zh: 少数民族的手工艺品精美绝伦。

sentence: 在大姐失踪之后，我精神恍惚。领导上这时又要我写个大姐的简历，要进行追功
translation_en: After my elder sister went missing, I was in a daze mentally. Just then, our superiors asked me to write up an application for my elder sister, so as to pursue recognition.
translation_zh: 在姐姐失踪后，我精神恍惚。正当我茫然无措时，领导要求我为姐姐写申请，以便追究责任。

sentence: 事物是往返曲折的，不是径情直遂的
translation_en: Things are full of twists and turns, not straightforward and smooth sailing.
translation_zh: 事情总是充满曲折和波折，非一帆风顺的徑情直遂。

sentence: 即使寻到一点光明，‘径一周三’，却更分明的看见了周围的无涯际的黑暗
translation_en: Even if we find a glimmer of light, 'a journey of three days', we can see even more clearly the endless darkness all around us.
translation_zh: 即使我们找到了微光，'一路走三天'，我们仍然可以清晰地看到周围无尽的黑暗。

sentence: 我喜欢那种锤炼，那种色彩的配合，那种镜花水月
translation_en: I appreciate the beauty of refinement, the harmony of colors, and the ethereal beauty that is fleeting like flowers reflected in water.
translation_zh: 我深感欣赏那些细致的美丽、色彩和谐以及如镜花水月般短暂的神秘之美。

sentence: 值得注意的是山的南北，自然条件迥乎不同
translation_en: What's worth noting is that the south and north of the mountain have vastly different natural conditions.
translation_zh: 南北山区的自然条件迥乎不同。

sentence: 炯炯有神的眼光，足够表现出他是一个有志的少年
translation_en: His bright eyes shine with determination, clearly showing that he is a young man of ambition.
translation_zh: 他的眼睛炯炯有神，充分展现出他是一个有抱负的年轻人。

sentence: 我不想旧话重提
translation_en: I'd rather not bring up old topics again.
translation_zh: 我不愿再提起旧话重提的那些问题。

sentence: 用传统的艺术形式，表现新的内容不正是旧瓶新酒吗
translation_en: Isn't that exactly what using traditional artistic forms to express new content is all about?
translation_zh: 用传统的艺术形式表达新的内容，难道不是旧瓶装新酒吗？

sentence: 看校样时的聚精会神，就和在写作的时候一样，因为我的目的要使它没有一个错字
translation_en: When reviewing the proofs, I focus just as intently as when writing, because my goal is to ensure there's not a single typo.
translation_zh: 在审阅校样时，我就像写作一样专注，因为我的目标是确保没有一个字母错误。

sentence: 绝子绝孙是骂人的话
translation_en: Having no descendants is a curse.
translation_zh: 没有后代是绝子绝孙的灾难。

sentence: 开中药处方时，要安排好各味药的君臣佐使关系
translation_en: When prescribing traditional Chinese medicine, it is essential to arrange the relationships between the monarch, minister, assistant, and messenger herbs properly.
translation_zh: 当开处方中医时，必须恰当安排君臣佐使的关系。

sentence: 双方代表开诚相见，就两方面合作事宜达成了一致
translation_en: Both sides' representatives met openly, reaching an agreement on matters of cooperation between them.
translation_zh: 两边代表开诚相见后，达成合作事项的共识。

sentence: 今天的演出是群众文化月的开台锣鼓，更精彩的内容还在后头
translation_en: Today's performance is the opening ceremony of Mass Culture Month, with even more exciting content to come.
translation_zh: 今天的演出是大型文化月开幕式，之后更精彩的内容将接踵而至。

sentence: 在这开宗明义的第一信里，请你们容我在你们面前介绍我自己
translation_en: In this opening letter, I would like to take this opportunity to introduce myself to you all.
translation_zh: 在这封开头信中，我想趁这个机会开宗明义，向大家自我介绍。

sentence: 它跑得那么平稳，使骑马的人仿佛觉得它不是在坎坷不平的路上跑，而是走在极其柔软的地毯上
translation_en: It runs so smoothly that it makes the rider feel as if they're not on a bumpy road, but rather gliding across an extremely soft carpet.
translation_zh: 它的运转如此顺畅，仿佛骑乘者根本就不是在颠簸的路上，而是滑行在极其柔软的地毯上，完全没有坎坷不平的感觉。

sentence: 有些人惯于看风使舵，看领导眼色行事
translation_en: Some people have a habit of reading the wind to adjust their sails, acting according to what they see in their leaders' eyes.
translation_zh: 有些人有看风使舵的习惯，根据他们眼中的领导人的表现来调整自己的行为。

sentence: 随着教育事业的发展，科班出身的人越来越多
translation_en: As education advances, more and more people come from specialized academic backgrounds.
translation_zh: 随着教育的进步，越来越多的人是科班出身。

sentence: 她活了五十年，第一次感觉到自己还不是一个可有可无的人
translation_en: She lived for fifty years, only now feeling that she's still not someone who can be easily replaced.
translation_zh: 她活了五十年，才意识到自己还是可以被轻易取代的人。

sentence: 坑蒙拐骗发不了大财，发了小财也长不了
translation_en: Deception and cunning will never bring great wealth, even if you do get some money it won't last long.
translation_zh: 坑蒙拐骗终究不会带来大财，哪怕你暂时赚到一些钱，也不过是短暂的虚幻。

sentence: 解放前夕，我们全家六口流落在这座小城市里，口多食寡，连一天三顿饭都无法维持
translation_en: Before our liberation, we were left with six mouths to feed in this small city, where food was scarce, and it was hard to make ends meet even for three meals a day.
translation_zh: 在我们解放之前，这座小城市的口多食寡，六个嘴馋的人要挤兑吃饭，哪怕是三餐也难以凑足。

sentence: 在旧社会，由于地主豪绅无休止的刳脂剔膏，人民的生活十分困苦
translation_en: In the old society, due to the landlords' and gentry's relentless exploitation of peasants, people's lives were extremely difficult.
translation_zh: 在古老的社会里，由于地主和士绅对农民的无情剥削，人们的生活极为艰难，犹如被人刮尽了最后一点油脂和精华。

sentence: 我们要经得起狂风恶浪的冲击
translation_en: We need to withstand the fierce storms and raging waves.
translation_zh: 我们必须要能抵御狂风恶浪的袭击。

sentence: 有钱的便狂嫖滥赌，没钱的便喝几十碗酒
translation_en: The wealthy will wildly indulge in prostitution and gambling, while the poor will drink dozens of bowls of wine.
translation_zh: 富人会疯狂地嫖娼、滥赌，而穷人则会喝上十几碗酒。

sentence: 我们不能滥用职权去谋私利
translation_en: We cannot abuse our power for personal gain.
translation_zh: 我们不能滥用职权来谋取私利。

sentence: 在我自己有记忆的二、三岁时，她已经把唐诗绝句教我暗诵，能诵得琅琅上口
translation_en: When I was two or three years old, she had already taught me to recite Tang poetry by heart, and I could recite it fluently with ease.
translation_zh: 当我还是两三岁的时候，她就已经教会我背诵唐诗，琅琅上口，读起来如流水般顺畅。

sentence: 这班学生因为稂莠不齐，所以管教不易
translation_en: This class of students is mixed with good and bad, making it difficult to manage them.
translation_zh: 这类学生中好坏参半，管理起来非常困难，真的是稂莠不齐。

sentence: 不注意科学，一味地蛮干，结果必定是劳而无功
translation_en: Without paying attention to science, recklessly rushing forward, the result is bound to be laborious without achieving anything.
translation_zh: 不注重科学，莽撞前进，必然是劳而无功。

sentence: 我们工作中要注意劳逸结合提高工作效率
translation_en: We need to balance work and rest during our working hours to improve productivity.
translation_zh: 为了提高工作效率，我们需要在工作时间内劳逸结合。

sentence: 我们的团结和友谊是牢不可破的
translation_en: Our unity and friendship are unbreakable.
translation_zh: 我们的团结和友谊是牢不可破的。

sentence: 他的儿子在前线光荣牺牲，听到这个消息，他不禁老泪纵横
translation_en: His son died heroically on the front lines, upon hearing this news he couldn't help but burst into tears.
translation_zh: 听闻儿子在前线英勇牺牲的消息，他不禁老泪纵横。

sentence: 以前，他不肯抢别人的买卖，特别是对于那些老弱残兵；以他的身体，以他的车，去和他们争座儿，还能有他们的份
translation_en: In the past, he wouldn't take over someone else's business, especially not from those weak and elderly people; with his physical condition and his car, going to compete for their share would only end up being theirs anyway.
translation_zh: 他过去不愿接管别人的生意，尤其是那些老弱残兵的；考虑到他的身体状况和车子，他去竞争他们的份额只会让他们占上风。

sentence: 一时间好像沉进洪荒远古的宁静里，忘记自己，脑子里幻出离奇古怪的神话
translation_en: In an instant, it's as if I sank into the primordial tranquility of a bygone era, forgetting myself, with fantastical myths unfolding in my mind.
translation_zh: 在一瞬间，我仿佛沉入了一个遥远年代的原始宁静之中，忘却了自己，脑海中浮现出离奇古怪的神话故事。

sentence: 中国是一个礼仪之邦
translation_en: China is a country with a long tradition of etiquette and courtesy.
translation_zh: 中国是礼仪之邦，拥有悠久的礼节和尊严传统。

sentence: 这面墙砌得里出外进的，只好拆了重修
translation_en: This wall was built with the interior facing outward, so it had to be torn down for renovation.
translation_zh: 由于这堵墙的内部面朝外，必须拆除重建。

sentence: 并不等候答复，而正如一般忽然陷于理屈词穷的专横者一样，他立刻把最后一张牌摆出来了
translation_en: He didn't wait for a response, but just like an overbearing person who suddenly finds himself at a loss for words, he immediately laid out his last card.
translation_zh: 他没有等待回应，突然就像一个刚刚发现自己说不出话的嚣张人一样，他马上亮出了最后一张牌。

sentence: 他在这次会议上力排众议，终于使自己的观点得到了与会代表的支持
translation_en: He forcefully overcame opposition at this meeting, ultimately gaining the support of the attending representatives for his point of view.
translation_zh: 他在会上力排众议，最后获得出席代表的支持。

sentence: 力所不及的事情我们也要想办法去做
translation_en: Things that are beyond our power, we still have to find ways to do them.
translation_zh: 力所不及的事务，我们仍然要想方设法去做。

sentence: 特别是要用实例、用典型示范去告诉他们组织起来的好处，这种好处是超出单干户力所能及的
translation_en: Especially by using examples, typical demonstrations to tell them of the benefits of organizing themselves, these benefits far exceed what individual households can achieve on their own.
translation_zh: 通过举例、典型的演示来告诉他们组织自己有多大的好处，这些好处远远超过了个人家庭能够实现的范围。

sentence: 他一直希望能化解这两家的仇恨，但力有未逮，他们仍然争吵不休
translation_en: He has always hoped to reconcile their hatred, but it's been beyond his power; they still continue to argue with each other.
translation_zh: 他一直希望弥合他们的仇恨，但力有未逮；他们仍在互相争执。

sentence: 那是力争上游的一种树，笔直的干，笔直的枝
translation_en: It is a tree that strives to reach higher, straight trunk, straight branches.
translation_zh: 这棵树力争上游，直径粗壮的干脉和笔直的枝条。

sentence: 工作中必须厉行节约，反对浪费
translation_en: In our work, we must strictly practice thriftiness and oppose waste.
translation_zh: 在我们的工作中，我们必须严格实践厉行节约，反对浪费。

sentence: 我们要在社会里混出头，只求不僵，只求不落伍，这是现代人立身处世的名言
translation_en: We want to stand out in society, as long as we don't become outdated, as long as we don't fall behind, this is a famous saying for modern people to live by.
translation_zh: 我们要在社会中脱颖而出，只要不落后于时代，只要不被历史淘汰，这是现代人生活的座右铭，立身处世。

sentence: 天地如此之大，难道竟连一个十八岁的女孩子的立锥之地都没有
translation_en: The world is so vast, can it really have no place for an eighteen-year-old girl to stand on her own two feet.
translation_zh: 世界如此辽阔，难道就没有一个地方让十八岁的女孩能够独立立锥之地吗。

sentence: 解决环境污染问题，是与人民健康利害攸关的一件大事
translation_en: Solving environmental pollution issues is a matter of great concern to people's health.
translation_zh: 解决环境污染问题与民众健康的利害攸关。

sentence: 连绵不断的高山阻挡我们的去路
translation_en: The endless mountain range blocks our path.
translation_zh: 连绵不断的山脉阻塞了我们的道路。

sentence: 这里的丘陵真是连绵起伏
translation_en: The rolling hills here truly stretch out endlessly.
translation_zh: 这里的rolling hills连绵起伏得真令人叹为观止。

sentence: 最初沉醉在男性的柔情里，一年之后，孩子连三接二的来了，又一下子跌入所谓神圣的母爱里了
translation_en: Initially, she was intoxicated by the tenderness of men, but a year later, children came one after another, and then she fell headfirst into what is called sacred motherly love.
translation_zh: 她最初被男性温柔的气质所迷醉，但一年后，孩子们一个接着一个地出生，她就坠入了所谓的圣母般的爱中。

sentence: 我们要注意此事的连锁反应
translation_en: We need to pay attention to the chain reaction of this matter.
translation_zh: 我们必须注意到这个问题的连锁反应。

sentence: 国家公务员应该廉洁奉公
translation_en: Government officials should serve with integrity and dedication.
translation_zh: 政府官员应廉洁奉公。

sentence: 只要我们聚在一起，哪怕是吵得脸红耳赤，心里也是甜滋滋的
translation_en: As long as we're together, even if we argue until our faces turn red, our hearts will still feel sweet.
translation_zh: 只要我们在一起，即使争吵到脸红耳赤，我们的心仍会感到甜蜜。

sentence: 这种恋新忘旧的人不值得你难过
translation_en: Someone who easily falls for new things and forgets about the old ones doesn't deserve to make you sad.
translation_zh: 对那些容易为新鲜事物所迷惑又轻易忘记旧日情谊的人来说，没资格让你感到伤心。

sentence: 和一位缔交半个多世纪的良师益友诀别，悲痛之情是难以尽述的
translation_en: It's hard to put into words the depth of sorrow at parting with a mentor who has been by my side for over half a century.
translation_zh: 与良师益友共度半个世纪的岁月，分手时难以用言语表达心中的深深哀痛。

sentence: 你看他走路踉踉跄跄的
translation_en: He's walking unsteadily.
translation_zh: 他走路踉踉跄跄。

sentence: 这两种运动合起来便能够互收效益，分开来定要两败俱伤
translation_en: When combined, these two approaches can complement each other effectively; however, if pursued separately, they will likely cancel each other out.
translation_zh: 当结合起来时，这两个方法可以互相补充得很好；然而，如果各自单独追求，结果只会是两败俱伤。

sentence: 他做事的时候非常专心，好象两豆塞耳，什么都听不见
translation_en: When he's working, he is extremely focused, like having two beans stuck in his ears, unable to hear anything else.
translation_zh: 当他工作时，他非常专注，像两粒豆子塞进了他的耳朵里，什么声音都听不见。

sentence: 为朋友两肋插刀，不算什么
translation_en: It's nothing to be concerned about for friends who have each other's backs.
translation_zh: 朋友们彼此相互支持，两肋插刀自然就不用担心了。

sentence: 土霸打倒，穷苦人见青天。不是两全其美
translation_en: The tyrant has been overthrown, the poor people can see blue sky again. It's not about getting both sides happy.
translation_zh: 当暴君被推翻，穷人又能看到蓝天的时候，它并不是要让双方都满意。

sentence: 这下子可不得了啦！真好像烈火烹油，会场一下子炸了——空前的大爆炸
translation_en: This is going to be huge! It's like pouring gasoline on fire, the whole scene just erupted – an explosion of unprecedented proportions.
translation_zh: 这将会是史无前例的巨大事件！像在烈火烹油一样，整个场景一下子就爆发了。

sentence: 临阵磨刀也不顶用，只有靠平时的努力
translation_en: In the heat of battle, sharpening one's skills won't do much good; it's only through consistent hard work that counts.
translation_zh: 在激战的当口，仅凭锻炼技艺是无济于事的；只有坚持不懈地努力，才是关键。

sentence: 这样零打碎敲也不是办法
translation_en: It's no solution to hit at it randomly.
translation_zh: 零打碎敲并不是解决问题的好方法。

sentence: 她在大人面前还是这样。那在家里是简直闹得六畜不安
translation_en: She still behaves like that in front of adults, but at home it's chaos beyond description.
translation_zh: 她在大人面前仍然那样表现，但回家后却是六畜不安。

sentence: 见那些大哥哥还在龙马精神地说话，她也听不出味道，就打了两个哈欠，悄悄溜了出来
translation_en: Seeing that those big brothers were still talking with great enthusiasm, she couldn't make out what they were saying, so she yawned twice and quietly slipped away.
translation_zh: 看到那些大哥们仍然兴致勃勃地聊天，她却听不清他们在说什么，于是她打了两次哈欠，悄悄溜走了。

sentence: 只记得纸上龙蛇飞舞，笔势很好看的
translation_en: I only remember dragons and snakes dancing on paper, with very beautiful brushstrokes.
translation_zh: 我只记得纸上龙蛇飞舞的画卷，笔墨繁华。

sentence: 但是他的心情十分敞朗，坚信只要度过这段困难日子，局势就会好转，任自己龙腾虎跃
translation_en: But his mood is very optimistic, firmly believing that as long as he gets through this difficult period, things will get better, letting himself soar freely.
translation_zh: 他心情非常乐观，坚信只要渡过这难关，事情就会好转，让自己自由翱翔。

sentence: 他赶快转过口又说道‘我不过路见不平，说几句气话罢哩！’
translation_en: He quickly turned around and said, "I'm just passing by and saw something unfair, so I spoke up for what's right!"
translation_zh: 他快速转身说：“路见不平，必为之；”

sentence: 当年种的小树苗，如今已是绿叶成荫了
translation_en: The saplings planted that year have now grown into lush green canopies.
translation_zh: 绿叶成荫的树木已经在几年前种下，现在长成了茂密的绿色树冠。

sentence: 琴弹得乱七八糟，可是她的嗓子怪清亮的
translation_en: She plays the guqin very clumsily, but her voice is surprisingly clear.
translation_zh: 她弹古琴的技巧很差，但她的声音却意外地清晰，乱七八糟。

sentence: 此事我们只略知皮毛，不能擅下结论
translation_en: We only have a superficial understanding of this matter, and cannot make a hasty conclusion.
translation_zh: 我们对这件事只有略知皮毛，不能急于下结论。

sentence: 今天讲的内容很多，我们抓住荦荦大者就行
translation_en: We covered a lot of ground today, so let's focus on the main points.
translation_zh: 我们今天讨论了很多内容，主要是为了让大家对核心问题有一个清晰的了解。

sentence: 只要不轻敌，相信你们一定会马到成功
translation_en: As long as you don't underestimate them, I'm sure you'll achieve success in no time.
translation_zh: 只要你不轻视他们，我就相信你一定能马到成功。

sentence: 从此，我读什么书都不再马马虎虎了
translation_en: From now on, I'll read every book with great care and attention to detail.
translation_zh: 从此以后，我会对每本书都要精读，不能马马虎虎。

sentence: 因为多年买空卖空的结果，文界就荒凉了，文章的形式虽然比较的整齐起来，但战斗的精神却较前有退无进
translation_en: Because of years of buying high and selling low, the literary world has become desolate, articles may have taken on a more orderly form but the fighting spirit is no better than before.
translation_zh: 因为多年来一直在高价买进低价卖出，文学界变得荒芜，文章形式可能更加有条理，但战斗精神并没有比以前好多少。

sentence: 如今还不能替老百姓想，瞒上欺下，咱简直不是个人啦
translation_en: We can't even begin to think for the common people, deceiving those above while cheating those below, we're just not human anymore.
translation_zh: 我们已经不再是人类，瞒上欺下，根本无法为普通百姓考虑。

sentence: 为什么倒弄得闹闹攘攘，满城风雨的呢
translation_en: Why is everything such a commotion, like a storm raging all over town?
translation_zh: 为什么会这样大乱，像满城风雨一样。

sentence: 春天来了，漫山遍野都披上了绿装
translation_en: Spring has arrived, covering every mountain and field with greenery.
translation_zh: 春天来了，漫山遍野都是青绿的。

sentence: 春天来了，漫天遍地都是杜鹃花
translation_en: Spring has arrived, and everywhere you look there are azaleas.
translation_zh: 春天来了，到处都漫天遍地是杜鹃花。

sentence: 科学技术的发展是漫无止境的
translation_en: The development of science and technology is endless.
translation_zh: 科学技术的发展是漫无止境的。

sentence: 我不能叫你盲人瞎马地去乱闯
translation_en: I don't want you to go rushing around blindly like a blind man leading a blind horse.
translation_zh: 我不希望你像盲人带着瞎马一样胡乱地乱跑。

sentence: 十句不过懂得三句，其余都茫然不解
translation_en: It's all just empty words, only three things make sense to me, the rest is confusing nonsense.
translation_zh: 所有的说法都是空话，唯有这三件事对我来说是有意义的，其余都是令人困惑的胡言乱语。

sentence: 这是一座孤零零立在大海当中的小岛，四面是茫无涯际的海水和天空
translation_en: This is a small island standing alone in the middle of the sea, surrounded by endless ocean waters and sky on all sides.
translation_zh: 在茫无涯际的海洋中，这座小岛孤立地屹立在海平面上，四周被无尽的大海和天空环绕。

sentence: 你不要希望蒙混过关
translation_en: Don't expect to get away with it.
translation_zh: 不可以想蒙混过关。

sentence: 从此以后，以管弦的情绪代替了鼓的情绪，结果都是靡靡之音
translation_en: From then on, orchestral emotions replaced those of the drums, resulting in monotonous sounds.
translation_zh: 从那时起，乐队的情感取代了鼓声，产生出一种靡靡之音的单调声音。

sentence: 这种新见解，对于古书的矛盾可谓面面圆到
translation_en: This new insight is truly all-encompassing when it comes to the contradictions of ancient texts.
translation_zh: 这个新见解在处理古代文本的矛盾时，面面圆到。

sentence: 如果把我们栽种在阴暗偏陬，那就染上官气暮气，苗而不秀
translation_en: If we were planted in a dark, secluded place, then we would take on an official, stale atmosphere, growing but not flourishing.
translation_zh: 如果我们被种在一个黑暗、偏僻的地方，那么我们就会像苗而不秀一样，生长但不繁荣。

sentence: 写法又明朗简洁，绝无旧文人描头画角，宛转抑扬的恶习
translation_en: The writing style is now clear and concise, free from the old-fashioned habit of describing every detail and the mannerisms of turning phrases up and down.
translation_zh: 现在的写作风格清晰简洁，已经摆脱了旧式的习惯，描述每个细节和把句子往返转换的毛病，如今的文章就像描绘人物头部和身体四周一样全面。

sentence: 在这大时代里，生与死的意义固然都很重大，然而，对于一个生活在空隙当中的人，却又是多么的渺不足道呵
translation_en: In this grand era, the significance of life and death is indeed immense, yet for someone living in the void, it's all so utterly insignificant.
translation_zh: 在这个宏大的时代，生命与死亡的意义确实是无比深远，但对于生活在虚空中的一个人来说，所有的一切都显得渺不足道。

sentence: 田间是静悄悄的，大路上也是静悄悄的渺无人踪
translation_en: The fields were eerily quiet, and so was the main road, devoid of any signs of human presence.
translation_zh: 田野空寂无人烟，主路也一片沉寂，完全没有人类的踪迹。

sentence: 这番讲话，既有好教训又说得妙趣横生，给我们官兵以极深刻的印象
translation_en: This speech, both serves as good lessons and is full of wit, leaving us officials and soldiers with an extremely deep impression.
translation_zh: 这番话既有教育意义又充满智慧，留给我们官员和士兵深刻的印象，妙趣横生。

sentence: 若不是妙手偶得，便确是经过锤炼的语言的精华
translation_en: It is only through meticulous refinement that one can distill the essence of language.
translation_zh: 只有经过精心的琢磨，才能妙手偶得语言的精髓。

sentence: 中国的名胜古迹值得我们去参观
translation_en: China's famous historical sites are definitely worth visiting.
translation_zh: 中国的名胜古迹值得一游。

sentence: 中国的长城名闻遐迩
translation_en: China's Great Wall is famous far and wide.
translation_zh: 中国的长城名闻遐迩。

sentence: 明眼人可以看出你这是明升暗降的把戏
translation_en: It's clear to anyone with eyes that this is just a case of promoting yourself while demoting others.
translation_zh: 明升暗降的本质在于抬高自己同时贬低他人，这一点显而易见。

sentence: 他害怕事情一旦变化，他将有不测大祸，所以跪在地上回答了一句模棱两可的话
translation_en: He was afraid that once things changed, he would suffer an untimely disaster, so he knelt down on the ground to answer with a vague and ambiguous statement.
translation_zh: 他害怕一旦情况发生变化，他就会遭遇不期而至的灾难，所以他跪在地上回答了一句含糊其辞、模棱两可的话。

sentence: 这是第一次出马，人们都摩拳擦掌，心里突突跳着准备战斗
translation_en: This is their first time to ride out, everyone's itching for battle, their hearts racing with excitement as they prepare to fight.
translation_zh: 他们这是第一次出马，人人都迫不及待地要上战场，心头激荡着胜利的喜悦，摩拳擦掌准备好迎接战斗。

sentence: 没有磨杵成针的毅力，学问上就不可能有很深的造诣
translation_en: Without the perseverance to grind down an axe head into a needle, one's erudition will never reach great depths.
translation_zh: 没有磨杵成针的毅力，一辈子也学不会深造。

sentence: 讨论会上，大家都对提出的问题踊跃发表意见，而他却一直默不作声
translation_en: At the discussion meeting, everyone enthusiastically expressed their opinions on the issues raised, while he remained completely silent throughout.
translation_zh: 在讨论会议上，大家热情地表达了他们对提出的问题的意见，而他却始终默不作声。

sentence: 谁愿意做目光如鼠的人，只是嗅着鼻子前面的一点油香
translation_en: Who is willing to become someone with eyes like a mouse, only sniffing at a faint scent of oil right in front of their nose.
translation_zh: 谁愿意成为目光如鼠的人，仅凭着鼻子闻到前面一点点的油味。

sentence: 这个故事的结尾留下了一个悬念，耐人寻味
translation_en: This story's ending leaves one with a lingering question, full of intrigue.
translation_zh: 这个故事的结尾让人耐人寻味，充满了谜团。

sentence: 你要通知到村里的男女老少
translation_en: Everyone in the village, including men, women, and children, needs to be notified.
translation_zh: 全村男女老少都需要通报。

sentence: 这个说话南腔北调的人，不适合当解说员
translation_en: This person with a southern accent speaking in a northern dialect is not suitable to be an interpreter.
translation_zh: 这位南腔北调的人不适合做翻译。

sentence: 现在则相反，除粮食外，每天每人只有五分大洋的油盐柴菜钱，还是难乎为继
translation_en: Now it's just the opposite, except for food, each person only has five cents a day for oil salt firewood vegetables, still hard to make ends meet.
translation_zh: 现在除了吃饭外，每个人每天只有五分钱来买油盐柴菜，仍然很难为继。

sentence: 要这个守财奴募捐，那真是难如登天
translation_en: It's like asking a miser to donate money, which is as impossible as climbing to heaven.
translation_zh: 请不要像要一个吝啬鬼捐钱一样，难如登天。

sentence: 这件事情真是让人难以置信
translation_en: This is truly unbelievable.
translation_zh: 这简直难以置信。

sentence: 这个月开销太大，不到月底就囊空如洗了
translation_en: This month's expenses are too high, I'll be broke by the end of the month.
translation_zh: 本月的开支太高了，到月底我就像囊空如洗一样。

sentence: 这些由能工巧匠手工织绣的彩锦，运销世界各地
translation_en: These intricately embroidered silk fabrics, crafted by skilled artisans, are shipped to destinations all around the world.
translation_zh: 这些精心刺绣的丝织品，由能工巧匠打造，运往世界各地。

sentence: 这就叫大丈夫能屈能伸
translation_en: This is what it means to be a true man, able to bend and able to straighten himself.
translation_zh: 这才是真正的男子汉，能屈能伸。

sentence: 你不妨耐心地听一听逆耳良言，也许这对于你是有好处的
translation_en: It's worth listening patiently to some harsh words, which may actually benefit you.
translation_zh: 逆耳良言，耐听一些苛刻的话可能对你有益处。

sentence: 趁你们年富力强的时候，为人民做出更多的贡献吧
translation_en: Make the most of your youth and vitality to contribute more to the people.
translation_zh: 年富力强，应当尽早为人民做出更大的贡献。

sentence: 我最初实在替这孩子捏一把汗，待到掘出黄金一釜，这才觉得轻松
translation_en: I was genuinely worried sick about this child at first, but it wasn't until we struck gold that I felt relieved.
translation_zh: 我最初对这个孩子感到极度担忧，但直到我们捏了一把汗后，我才感到放心。

sentence: 为了不影响别人，同学们在阅览室里走路都是蹑手蹑脚的
translation_en: To avoid disturbing others, students walk quietly in the reading room.
translation_zh: 为了避免打扰他人，学生们在阅览室里走路时都要 蹑手蹑脚。

sentence: 只是近来常常在梦中，或是在将醒未醒之顷，一阵悚然，从前所怕的牛头马面，都积压了来，都聚围了来
translation_en: It's only recently that I've often found myself in dreams, or at the moment of almost waking up, a chill runs down my spine, as all the terrifying ox heads and horse faces from before have come flooding back, all gathered around me.
translation_zh: 最近我经常在梦中或几乎醒来时，会感到一阵寒意从脊柱流下，因为之前那些可怕的牛头马面又一次涌回来了，都围绕着我。

sentence: 你不要忸怩作态好不好
translation_en: Don't act so awkwardly, okay?
translation_zh: 不要忸怩作态，好吗？

sentence: 你不要扭曲作直了
translation_en: Don't distort it to make it seem straightforward.
translation_zh: 不要扭曲作直。

sentence: 这种排山倒海的巨潮，是任何顽固势力所不能抵挡得住的
translation_en: This massive tidal wave is one that no stubborn force can withstand.
translation_zh: 这股巨大的汹涌波浪，根本无法抵挡的。

sentence: 从此之后，中国文坛新旧的界限，判若鸿沟
translation_en: From then on, the boundary between old and new literary circles in China was like a chasm.
translation_zh: 从那时起，中国的老派和新派文学圈之间的界限就像判若鸿沟。

sentence: 到这里来抛头露面，好不识羞
translation_en: To come out here, showing one's face, is quite shameless.
translation_zh: 抛头露面在这里简直是无耻。

sentence: 他跑马观花地把这部诗剧读了一遍，已经是傍晚时分了
translation_en: He read through this play at a gallop, glancing over it as if it were a flower display, by which time it was already evening.
translation_zh: 他像看花展一样草率地浏览了这场戏，结果等到已经是傍晚了。

sentence: 现在，全大队二十六个山塘水库，已经配套成龙，形成了一个水利灌溉网
translation_en: Currently, all twenty-six mountain reservoirs of the big team have been integrated to form an irrigation network.
translation_zh: 目前，整个大队的二十六座山上水库已经配套成龙，形成了一个灌溉网络。

sentence: 我一见到她就怦然心动
translation_en: I fell head over heels for her at first sight.
translation_zh: 我一见到她就怦然心动。

sentence: 我每遇着我所敬爱而知心的人，就喜欢披肝沥胆地畅谈
translation_en: Whenever I meet someone I truly admire and feel close to, I love to open up and talk freely with them.
translation_zh: 当我遇到真正令我敬仰并感到亲近的人时，我总是喜欢敞开心扉和他们畅所欲言，披肝沥胆。

sentence: 雨呀，披头盖脑地浇下来，顺脖子灌进去
translation_en: It's raining, pouring down on me head to toe, soaking right down my neck.
translation_zh: 雨下得非常大，披头盖脑地淋着，直淋到脖子里。

sentence: 这一趟出差弄得疲惫不堪
translation_en: This trip has left me utterly exhausted.
translation_zh: 这次旅行让我感到疲惫不堪。

sentence: 他总是乐于听取大家的意见，从不偏听偏信
translation_en: He is always willing to listen to everyone's opinions, never biased towards one side or another.
translation_zh: 他总是愿意倾听每个人意见,从不对某一方产生偏见。

sentence: 回想当年他翩翩年少，不知有多少女孩子为他倾倒
translation_en: Thinking back to his carefree youth, he had no idea how many girls were smitten with him.
translation_zh: 回想起他那风流倜儻的年轻岁月，他根本不知道有多少个女孩都对他心动得像翩翩年少一样。

sentence: 现在还常有骈四俪六，典丽堂皇的祭文、挽联、宣言、通电
translation_en: It is still common to see ornate, elegant, and majestic eulogies, couplets, declarations, and telegrams today.
translation_zh: 今天仍然常见到华丽、优雅和恢弘的挽联、对联、宣言和电报。

sentence: 他是一名品学兼优的好学生
translation_en: He is an outstanding student with excellent academic performance.
translation_zh: 他是品学兼优的优秀学生，成绩优异。

sentence: 学习上的提高总得有个过程，不可能平步登天
translation_en: Improvement on studies has to go through a process, it's impossible to rise to heaven by walking on flat ground.
translation_zh: 学习进步必须经过一个过程，走平坦路上想一下子飞升到天堂是不可能的，平步登天。

sentence: 你应该多干点实事，不要总评头论足
translation_en: You should do more practical things, don't always criticize from head to toe.
translation_zh: 你应该做一些实际的事情，别总是从头到脚地批评人家。

sentence: 新的内战危机忽然又迫在眉睫了
translation_en: A new civil war crisis has suddenly loomed large on the horizon again.
translation_zh: 新一轮的内战危机突然又一次迫在眉睫。

sentence: 我们要破除迷信，解放思想，大胆改革
translation_en: We need to break away from superstition, liberate our minds, and boldly reform.
translation_zh: 我们需要破除迷信，解放思想，勇敢地进行改革。

sentence: 只要我们有破釜沉舟的决心，就能克服学习上的各种困难
translation_en: As long as we have the determination to break our backs and sink our ships, we can overcome all sorts of difficulties in learning.
translation_zh: 只要我们有决心破釜沉舟，学习中的种种困难都能克服。

sentence: 我们要破旧立新改变封建意识
translation_en: We need to break with the old and establish something new, changing feudal consciousness.
translation_zh: 我们需要与旧的东西断裂，建立新的东西，改变封建意识。

sentence: 洪水霎时铺天盖地而来，冲倒了树木和房屋
translation_en: The floodwaters suddenly poured down from all directions, sweeping away trees and houses.
