translation_en: In the distance, there are several rural villages, with dense clusters of trees and houses overlapping each other, exuding an atmosphere of lush verdure.
translation_zh: 在远处，村庄密集的树木和房屋重叠，呈现出一片郁郁葱葱的景色。

sentence: 与其欲盖弥彰，倒不如自己先认了
translation_en: It's better to admit it yourself rather than trying to cover it up and make it worse.
translation_zh: 欲盖弥彰，自己承认更好，不要试图掩盖而使情况恶化。

sentence: 写文章经常采用欲扬先抑的手法
translation_en: The article often employs the technique of first lowering before elevating.
translation_zh: 欲扬先抑的技巧在这篇文章中经常被运用，先将某事降低到最低点，然后再予以抬高。

sentence: 还争什么强，要结下下一辈的冤家对头吗
translation_en: What's there to fight for, do you want to become sworn enemies with the next generation?
translation_zh: 你要和下一代成为冤家对头，到底为了什么而打架呢？

sentence: 我已经查明白源源本本是怎么一回事
translation_en: I've finally figured out what's going on from the very beginning.
translation_zh: 我终于从头开始就明白了事情的原委。

sentence: 我们很郑重地和工头约法三章，什么时候交稿，什么时候看校，什么时候拼版
translation_en: We have very seriously negotiated with the foreman, including what time to submit the manuscript, when to review proofs, and when to do the typesetting.
translation_zh: 我们已经非常认真地与工头进行了磋商，包括提交手稿的时间、审阅校样的时候以及排版工作何时进行。

sentence: 河湾子修堰坝的工地，月明星稀，小河水静静流入水渠
translation_en: The construction site of the dike at River Bay is under repair, with a moonlit sky and few stars, as the small river flows quietly into the canal.
translation_zh: 月明星稀的夜晚，河堤修复工地正在进行中，河水静悄悄地流入运河。

sentence: 孩子能做的事，父母不要越俎代庖
translation_en: Let children do what they can, don't interfere with their work.
translation_zh: 让孩子们做他们能做的事，别越俎代庖。

sentence: 战士们行进在云雾迷蒙的山间小路上
translation_en: Soldiers marched along the winding mountain path shrouded in mist.
translation_zh: 士兵们在弥漫着云雾的蜿蜒山路上行军。

sentence: 这些数学公式他掌握的很好，所以做题能运用自如
translation_en: He has a good grasp of these mathematical formulas, so he can apply them easily to his homework.
translation_zh: 他对这些数学公式有着深刻的理解，能够运用自如地将它们应用于作业。

sentence: 欠你的账，即使砸锅卖铁我也要给你还上
translation_en: I owe you one, no matter how poor I am, I will still pay you back.
translation_zh: 我贫穷到砸锅卖铁的地步，也会还你一笔钱。

sentence: 春节晚会上，穿着节日盛装的各族代表，在舞台上载歌载舞，欢庆节日
translation_en: During the Spring Festival gala, representatives from various ethnic groups, dressed in their festive attire, sang and danced on stage to celebrate the holiday.
translation_zh: 在春节晚会上，各民族代表身着盛装，载歌载舞于舞台上庆祝节日。

sentence: 取得好成绩也不能自满，要再接再厉，不断进取
translation_en: Achieving good results is not enough to be complacent, one should continue striving and making progress constantly.
translation_zh: 取得好成绩并不足以让人满足，必须再接再厉地努力进步。

sentence: 曾经有位总长，听说，他的出来就职，是因为某公司要来立案，表决时可以多一个赞成者，所以再作冯妇的
translation_en: There was once a minister who heard that he got appointed because a certain company wanted to file a lawsuit, so they could have an extra vote in favor during the voting process, thus making him a yes-man.
translation_zh: 因为某公司想起诉他，于是就能在投票过程中获得多一张有利的选票，从而让他成为一个唯命是从的人，所以这位部长曾经听说自己被任命的原因。

sentence: 只要你舍得这辆汽车，我就奉陪三百回合，直到大雨把汽车冲进大河，咱俩一同葬身鱼腹
translation_en: If you're willing to give up this car, I'll play three hundred rounds with you until the heavy rain sweeps it into the river, and we both meet our demise at the bottom of the fish's belly.
translation_zh: 如果你愿意放弃这辆车，我就和你打三百局牌，直到大雨把它冲进河里，我们俩都葬身鱼腹。

sentence: 他按照早出晚归捕鱼撒网那股悠闲的心情撑着船，编算着使自己高兴也使别人高兴的事情
translation_en: He rows his boat with a carefree heart, casting out nets to fish early in the morning and returning late at night, thinking of things that would bring him joy as well as others.
translation_zh: 他早出晚归，心情放松地划着船，清晨抛网捕鱼，傍晚归来，常想些能给自己和他人带来快乐的事。

sentence: 这人品质恶劣，对别人惯会造谣中伤
translation_en: This person has a poor character, with a tendency to spread rumors and slander others.
translation_zh: 这个人品行不端，经常在背后造谣中伤人。

sentence: 农民向国家交售征购粮是责无旁贷的任务
translation_en: It is the farmer's duty to sell grain to the state at government-set prices.
translation_zh: 农民有责任按照政府规定的价格将粮食卖给国家，这是他们的首要职责，不能推卸。

sentence: 曾几何时，他自己去做了一个小小的官儿回来，而他又劝我去学法政了
translation_en: At one time, he went out to become a small official himself and came back, and then he urged me to study law and politics again.
translation_zh: 曾几何时他就想自己做个小官，出来后又回来了，然后他又催促我重新学习法律和政治。

sentence: 老兄是曾经沧海，车皮底下也呆过三天三夜，这一点挤，而且不过两个钟头，不算什么，算不了什么
translation_en: He's been through thick and thin, having spent three days and nights under a goods wagon, which is quite cramped, but only for two hours, that's nothing, it doesn't count for much.
translation_zh: 他历尽艰难险阻，曾经沧海，三天两夜躺在货车底下，空间很小，但只有一两个小时，算不了什么。

sentence: 由于经营不善，这家公司现已陷入债台高筑的境地
translation_en: Due to poor management, this company has now fallen into a state of deep financial trouble.
translation_zh: 由于管理不善，这家公司如今债台高筑。

sentence: 我喜欢那种斩钉截铁的作风
translation_en: I like that kind of straightforward style.
translation_zh: 我喜欢那种斩钉截铁的直率风格。

sentence: 我心里又想起母亲的劳苦，辗转反侧睡不着，很想起来陪陪母亲
translation_en: I keep thinking about how hard my mother worked, tossing and turning all night unable to sleep, I really wish I could spend some time with her.
translation_zh: 我总是想着母亲辛苦工作的样子，辗转反侧整夜都睡不着觉，真希望能和她一起度过一些时间。

sentence: 这种友谊来自战火纷飞的年代
translation_en: This friendship comes from an era of war-torn chaos.
translation_zh: 在战火纷飞的年代，这份友谊才得以萌生。

sentence: 灾区人民以战天斗地的英雄气概，克服洪水带来的困难，恢复生产，重建家园
translation_en: The people of the disaster-stricken area displayed heroic spirit, fighting against heaven and earth to overcome the difficulties brought by the floodwaters, restore production, and rebuild their homes.
translation_zh: 灾区人民展现出英勇的精神，战天斗地，克服洪水带来的困难，恢复生产，重建家园。

sentence: 那小孩战战兢兢地走着，唯恐摔倒
translation_en: The little boy walked cautiously, fearing he might trip.
translation_zh: 小男孩走路时战战兢兢，害怕会摔倒。

sentence: 不管风浪多大，他也不会张皇失措的
translation_en: No matter how turbulent the situation is, he will never panic.
translation_zh: 无论情况多么混乱，他都不会张皇失措。

sentence: 他们开始时，暗地里偷窃，随后就彰明昭著地任意抢夺
translation_en: They started by secretly stealing, then openly robbing at will.
translation_zh: 他们先是偷得无人知晓，后来则肆意抢劫彰明昭著。

sentence: 我们人手不足，需要招兵买马了
translation_en: We don't have enough manpower, we need to recruit more people now.
translation_zh: 我们人手不够，必须招兵买马来加强力量。

sentence: 他虽然没有什么出色的本领，有时还爱贪点小利，可是人顶和气，也不招是惹非
translation_en: Although he has no outstanding abilities, sometimes even loves to take small gains, yet he is very affable and does not provoke disputes.
translation_zh: 尽管他没有出众的才能，偶尔还喜欢取小便宜，但他很和蔼，不招惹纠纷。

sentence: 洪水霎时遮天盖地而来，冲倒了树木和房屋
translation_en: A massive flood suddenly blocked out the sky and covered the earth, sweeping away trees and houses.
translation_zh: 一场巨大的洪水突然遮天盖地，席卷了树木和房屋。

sentence: 你家里有什么东西也得登记上，是个针头线脑也得算上
translation_en: Even things at home need to be registered, down to a needle and thread.
translation_zh: 家中甚至连针头线脑都需要登记。

sentence: 一百个说空话的人，不如一个有真才实学的实干家
translation_en: A hundred people who talk nonsense, are not as valuable as one person with genuine talent and practical skills.
translation_zh: 百口不如一舌，真才实学的人才是真正有价值的。

sentence: 处理任何案件，都必须有真凭实据
translation_en: All cases must have solid evidence to be handled.
translation_zh: 所有案件都必须有真凭实据才能处理。

sentence: 经过公安干警一个多月的严密侦察，这桩案件终于真相大白
translation_en: After months of intense surveillance by public security officers, the truth behind this case has finally come to light.
translation_zh: 经过公安人员长期密切监视后，真相大白。

sentence: 我们在学习上要争分夺秒
translation_en: We have to fight for every second when it comes to studying.
translation_zh: 学习时每一秒都要与人拼搏，才能争分夺秒。

sentence: 正本清源的工作是艰巨复杂的，必须下大力气抓好
translation_en: The core work of rectifying the origin is arduous and complicated, requiring great effort to get it right.
translation_zh: 正本清源的工作极为艰难复杂，需要付出巨大的努力才能做到。

sentence: 受了丈夫的权利当然正名定分，该是她的丈夫，否则她为什么肯尽这些义务呢
translation_en: She has taken on her husband's rights and responsibilities, so she should be considered his wife; otherwise, why would she agree to take on these obligations?
translation_zh: 她已经承担了丈夫的权利和责任，所以应该被视为他的妻子；否则，她为什么要同意承担这些义务呢？正名定分，不能两样看待。

sentence: 你现在能正正经经地当个新中国的人了，还不该高兴吗
translation_en: Now that you can genuinely be a person from New China, shouldn't you feel happy about it?
translation_zh: 现在你已经能够真实地成为新中国的人了，难道不应该感到高兴吗？

sentence: 我们不要把文章分析得支离破碎
translation_en: We don't want to break down the article into pieces.
translation_zh: 我们不愿意把文章支离破碎。

sentence: 老师希望我们健康成长，要知书达礼，全面发展
translation_en: The teacher hopes we can grow up healthily, learn extensively, and cultivate good manners for all-round development.
translation_zh: 教师希望我们能够健康成长、广泛学习，同时培养全面发展所需的知书达礼。

sentence: 一个快乐主义者首先得有知足的修养，就是古训所谓‘知足常乐’
translation_en: A hedonist first needs to cultivate contentment, which is what the ancient saying means by 'knowing satisfaction brings joy'.
translation_zh: 一个享乐主义者首先需要培养满足感，这就是古语所说的"知足常乐"。

sentence: 走错了路，就应赶紧回头，如果执迷不悟，那是非常危险的
translation_en: If you take the wrong path, it's best to turn back quickly; if you persist in being stubborn, that is extremely dangerous.
translation_zh: 如果你走错了路，还是要及时回头；如果执迷不悟，那简直是极其危险的。

sentence: 这几条罪案，本社同人当然直认不讳
translation_en: These several cases of crime, our colleagues here naturally admit to them without hesitation.
translation_zh: 这些几起案件，我们的同事们自然直认不讳。

sentence: 这倒不必多心，我是个无党无派的人，才敢这样直言不讳
translation_en: I don't need to worry about that, I'm a man without party affiliation, which is why I dare speak my mind so bluntly.
translation_zh: 我不必担心这件事，因为我是无党派人士，敢直言不讳。

sentence: 站在他们前头领导他们呢？还是站在他们后头指手画脚地批评他们呢
translation_en: Are they leading them from the front, or standing behind criticizing every step?
translation_zh: 他们是在前面带路，还是在后面指手画脚每一步都要批评。

sentence: 对犯有错误的同学，我们应采取治病救人的态度，帮助他们进步
translation_en: We should adopt a therapeutic approach towards students who have made mistakes, helping them to improve.
translation_zh: 我们应该采取治病救人的方法对待那些犯错的学生，帮助他们改进。

sentence: 万绿丛中的土屋，栉比鳞次的排列着
translation_en: In the midst of lush greenery, earthen houses stand side by side in neat rows.
translation_zh: 在茂密的绿色中，栉比鳞次的土屋排列成整齐的行。

sentence: 缅想当年景象那种踵趾相接的商旅队，商旅队中各种语言的交响
translation_en: The scene from years ago of merchants and travelers walking side by side, with various languages blending together in harmony within their groups.
translation_zh: 多年前商旅并肩行走的场景，各国语言融合在一起，踵趾相接。

sentence: 大家众口同声地称赞她献身于教育事业的精神
translation_en: Everyone praises her spirit of dedicating herself to the education profession with one voice.
translation_zh: 众人都称赞她以教育为业的精神。

sentence: 要从失败中吸取教训，以免重蹈覆辙
translation_en: We should learn from our failures to avoid repeating the same mistakes.
translation_zh: 我们应该从失败中吸取教训，避免重蹈覆辙。

sentence: 一大批被禁锢的艺术品，现在得以重睹天日了
translation_en: A large batch of artworks that were previously censored can now see the light of day again.
translation_zh: 之前被禁锢的众多艺术作品，如今终于能重睹天日。

sentence: 而镇压人民的反对，竟不惜采用最卑劣无耻的手段来诛锄异己
translation_en: In order to suppress opposition from the people, they will stop at nothing, even resorting to the most despicable and shameless methods to root out dissent.
translation_zh: 为了镇压民众的反对，他们会不择手段，甚至采用最卑劣、无耻的手法来诛锄异己。

sentence: 书法、绘画、吟诗，诸如此类，他无一不会
translation_en: Calligraphy, painting, reciting poetry - of this sort, he is capable of none of them.
translation_zh: 他对书法、绘画、吟诗这类事都无能为力。

sentence: 这是一个演说时代，所以‘诸色人等’都能演说
translation_en: This is an era of public speaking, so people of all walks of life can speak out.
translation_zh: 在这个口才横溢的时代，各行各业的人都可以自由发表自己的意见。

sentence: 机敏的公安人员根据现场的蛛丝马迹，很快找到了作案人的线索
translation_en: Sensitive law enforcement officials quickly found the suspect's clue based on the minute details at the scene.
translation_zh: 细致的警官迅速根据现场微小细节发现了嫌疑人的线索。

sentence: 因为她驻颜有术，所以虽然年过四十，看上去仍犹如少女
translation_en: Because she has the art of retaining her youth, so even though she is over forty, she still looks like a young girl.
translation_zh: 因为她擅长驻颜有术，所以尽管已经过了四十岁，她仍然看起来像个年轻女孩。

sentence: 会上陈列了他多年来的全部著作，那时他已是著作等身了
translation_en: On the occasion, all his works from years past were displayed; by then he had written enough to fill a library.
translation_zh: 当时他过去的所有作品都展出；此时他的著作已足以填满一座图书馆。

sentence: 领导者专横跋扈，就得不到群众的信任和支持
translation_en: A leader who is tyrannical and arbitrary will not gain the trust and support of the people.
translation_zh: 专横跋扈的领导者不可能获得人民的信任和支持。

sentence: 不由我不专心致志搞这一套
translation_en: It's hard for me to focus on this without being fully committed.
translation_zh: 专心致志才能真正地投入其中。

sentence: 转瞬之间，从曲折的山路有一队奔跑的马蹄声迎面而来
translation_en: In the blink of an eye, a group of galloping horses came thundering down the winding mountain road straight towards us.
translation_zh: 转瞬之间，几匹狂奔的马突然从蜿蜒的山路上冲了下来，直指我们。

sentence: 经医务人员的全力抢救，这名危重病人已经转危为安
translation_en: This critical patient has been stabilized after receiving all-out medical treatment from medical staff.
translation_zh: 经过全力医疗治疗，医护人员的努力使这位危重病人转危为安。

sentence: 你欠了我的，你得还。我一直没说过，你不能再装聋卖傻
translation_en: You owe me, you have to pay it back. I've never said anything before, but you can't keep pretending you don't know what's going on.
translation_zh: 你欠我的，必须还我。以前从来没说过什么，但你装聋卖傻地假装不知道这件事根本不可能。

sentence: 这些感情炽烈的诗篇，抒发了作者壮志未酬的愤懑之情
translation_en: These passionate poems express the author's unfulfilled ambitions and indignation.
translation_zh: 这些充满激情的诗篇体现了作者壮志未酬的深切感受和愤慨。

sentence: 学习上追根究底的精神，是非常可贵的
translation_en: Learning to dig deep and get to the root of things is a very valuable quality.
translation_zh: 学习追根究底的能力非常有价值。

sentence: 父亲，您生前谆谆教导我们，不要那种脱离人民的虚无主义、个人主义
translation_en: Father, you taught us before your passing to avoid that kind of nihilism and individualism that is detached from the people.
translation_zh: 父亲，您在离开我们之前曾经谆谆教导我们避免那种与人民脱节的无神论和个人主义。

sentence: 我们要奋发地工作，卓有成效地完成上级交给我们的任务
translation_en: We need to work diligently, effectively completing the tasks assigned by our superiors.
translation_zh: 我们需要认真努力地完成上级交代的任务，卓有成效。

sentence: 看到下一代健康活泼地茁壮成长，为人父母者无不感到十分欣慰
translation_en: Seeing their children grow up healthy and full of vitality, parents can't help but feel an immense sense of pride and satisfaction.
translation_zh: 看到孩子茁壮成长，父母不禁感到无比的自豪和满足。

sentence: 吃饭一拿起饭碗，就龇牙裂嘴装鬼脸说怎么净吃小米，还不敌猪食。人家那边一天两顿面，我还嫌不合口味
translation_en: As soon as I pick up my bowl, I show off a ghostly face by baring my teeth and stretching my mouth wide to say how disgusting it is that all we eat is rice porridge, which can't even compare to pig food. Meanwhile, they get noodles for breakfast and lunch every day, but I still find their dishes unpalatable.
translation_zh: 我一拿起碗，龇牙裂嘴地嚷嚷说这饭吃得实在是太糟了，我们每天都只吃米粥，连猪食都比不上，可他们却能天天吃面条早餐和午餐，可我还是觉得他们的菜不怎么好吃。

sentence: 读书人悲观失望，自暴自弃；可是那些工人却多么坚强呵，多么勇敢呵
translation_en: Book lovers are pessimistic and hopeless, giving up on themselves; but those workers are so resilient, so brave.
translation_zh: 书worms们总是自暴自弃，放弃自己；但那些工人却如此顽强，如此勇敢。

sentence: 散居世界各国的华侨，虽然不少已入外国籍，但其对祖国的忠诚仍是自不待言的
translation_en: Overseas Chinese who live scattered across various countries, although many have already obtained foreign citizenship, their loyalty to their homeland is still self-evident.
translation_zh: 尽管许多海外华人已经获得了外国国籍，但他们对祖国的忠诚仍是显而易见的自不待言。

sentence: 她自惭形秽般只呆在一个黑暗的角落里，不敢发一言
translation_en: She felt so ashamed that she just stood there in a dark corner, afraid to speak up.
translation_zh: 她感到深感自惭形秽，于是就站在黑暗的角落里，不敢开口。

sentence: 我们要自觉自愿地维护国家和民族的利益
translation_en: We must conscientiously and voluntarily safeguard the interests of our country and nation.
translation_zh: 我们必须自觉自愿地保护国家和民族的利益。

sentence: 后来的史官更是自郐以下了
translation_en: Later historians went even further than Zuo.
translation_zh: 后世史学家甚至超过了左传。

sentence: 有人说中国的实业就会借此促进，那是自欺欺人之谈
translation_en: Some people say that China's industry will benefit from this, but it is mere self-deception.
translation_zh: 有些人说中国的工业会从中受益，但这不过是自欺欺人。

sentence: 一个国家要想强盛，必须要有自强不息的精神
translation_en: For a country to become strong, it must have an indomitable spirit of self-reliance.
translation_zh: 为了让国家变得强大，它必须具有自强不息的顽强意志。

sentence: 玩火者只会自食其果
translation_en: Those who play with fire will only get burned.
translation_zh: 那些玩火的人只会自食其果。

sentence: 我么？你问我么？我是自私自利的个人主义者
translation_en: What's with you? You're asking me what's wrong? I'm a selfish, self-centered individualist.
translation_zh: 你到底在说什么？你问我有啥问题？我就是个自私自利的人。

sentence: 他本身是报纸编辑，因此每作新诗词必在报纸上自我吹嘘，俨然以当代文豪自居
translation_en: He is an editor of a newspaper by profession, so he always boasts about his new poems on the newspaper as if he were a modern literary giant.
translation_zh: 他以编辑报纸为职业，总是自我吹嘘说自己新作的诗篇在报上如同当代文坛巨匠一般。

sentence: 这些理论自相矛盾
translation_en: These theories contradict each other fundamentally.
translation_zh: 这些理论本质上是自相矛盾的。

sentence: 做事不能自行其是，最好听听别人的意见
translation_en: It's best to listen to others' opinions when making decisions, rather than acting on one's own initiative.
translation_zh: 当做自行其是时，容易走上歧途。

sentence: 一个严于解剖自己的人，往往是有自知之明的
translation_en: Someone who is stricter with themselves when it comes to self-examination, often has a clear understanding of their own strengths and weaknesses.
translation_zh: 自我反省时更严格的人，往往对自己的优点和缺点有着清晰的认识。

sentence: 察其原因，不外有少数顽固分子，不顾民族国家利益，恣意妄为
translation_en: The reason is simple, it's just that there are a few hardline elements who disregard national interests and act recklessly.
translation_zh: 有几个顽固分子恣意妄为，完全忽视国家利益。

sentence: 我国是一个多山之国，山脉纵横交错
translation_en: Our country is a mountainous nation, with mountain ranges stretching across it in every direction.
translation_zh: 我们的国家是一个山地国度，山脉纵横交错遍布其每个方向。

sentence: 你看他那种走马上任的神气，你就可以知道他是一位全然不懂教育的外行乃至老腐败
translation_en: Just by looking at how he takes over with such an air of authority, you can tell that he is completely clueless about education and even more so a veteran corrupt official.
translation_zh: 他走马上任的样子，完全透露了他对教育一无所知，更是毫无廉耻的老官僚。

sentence: 他感到，内心的一些想法摆到桌面上是站不住脚的，还是走为上策
translation_en: He feels that some of his inner thoughts can't stand on their own, so it's better to walk away.
translation_zh: 他认为有些自己的内心想法无法独立存在，于是决定走为上策。

sentence: 按照现在的用水量，我们的存水用到目的港是足足有余的
translation_en: Based on our current water usage, we have more than enough stored water to reach the destination port.
translation_zh: 根据目前的水资源消耗，我们已经储备了足足有余的水，足以到达目的港。

sentence: 这场空难事故的罪魁祸首竟然是一只在机场上空飞翔的鸽子
translation_en: The primary culprit behind this air disaster was surprisingly a pigeon flying overhead at the airport.
translation_zh: 罪魁祸首竟然是一只在机场飞过的鸽子。

sentence: 请问您的尊姓大名
translation_en: What is your honorific title and full name?
translation_zh: 请问您的尊姓大名?

sentence: 照顾‘左邻右舍’，不能搞先进迁就落后，不能搞平均主义
translation_en: Take care of those around you, do not coddle the advanced at the expense of the backward, do not practice egalitarianism.
translation_zh: 对周围的人要有所照顾，不能因为同情那些进步的而疏忽了落后的，不要实行平等主义。

sentence: 这件事真叫他左右两难
translation_en: This matter really puts him in a difficult position.
translation_zh: 这个问题让他左右两难。

sentence: 我们需要制定必要的规章制度，但不可过于繁琐，弄得作茧自缚，捆住自己的手脚
translation_en: We need to establish necessary rules, but they should not be overly complicated, lest we end up tying ourselves down with them and limiting our own freedom of action.
translation_zh: 我们需要制定必要的规则，但不能过于复杂，否则就像自己编织了绳子一样，限制了自己的行动自由。

sentence: 有些人只会坐而论道，而不办实事
translation_en: Some people only know how to sit around talking, but they don't get anything done.
translation_zh: 有些人只会坐着议论,但实际上并没有做出任何实质性的工作。

sentence: 我看他们实在是坐失机宜，让敌人多准备了一天一夜
translation_en: They have really missed an opportunity, giving the enemy an extra day to prepare.
translation_zh: 他们错过了一个关键时刻，给敌人留下了额外的时间来准备。

sentence: 别人有困难时，我们要热心帮助，决不能坐视不救
translation_en: When others encounter difficulties, we should be enthusiastic about helping them, and under no circumstances can we just stand by and do nothing to save them.
translation_zh: 当他人遇到困难时，我们应该热心帮助他们，而绝不能坐视不救。

sentence: 从早到晚，长椅上都是坐无虚席
translation_en: From morning till night, every seat on the bench was occupied.
translation_zh: 从早到晚，所有的座位都被占满了，坐无虚席。

sentence: 哪里有压迫，哪里就有反抗。人民大众不会坐以待毙
translation_en: Wherever there is oppression, there will be resistance. The people will never sit idly by to await their own demise.
translation_zh: 哪里有压迫就一定会有反抗。人民不会坐以待毙，等着自己的灭亡。
